news.Title: 操盤心法－AI基礎建設 帶動台股評價升級
news.Content:
市場分析：全球股市正處於害怕錯過（FOMO）的樂觀行情，以及中東硝煙與和平談判並行的危險平衡中，而美國聯準會（Fed）在通膨與衰退間的鋼索漫步，台股則處於AI推動歷史新高的壯闊場景。

雖然巴 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 市場分析：全球股市處於樂觀行情與中東硝煙並行，台股則處於AI推動歷史新高的場景。
• 台股預估獲利於地緣政治波動期間，仍因AI的貢獻而逆勢持續上修。
• 操作策略建議降低槓桿並減碼投機題材股與高乖離股，提高AI績優股與電子權值股，或相關ETF的投資比重。
• 台積電3月合併營收優於預期，3奈米產能滿載再加上急單效應與新台幣貶值，預期第一季毛利率將再創高。
news.Keywords: 台股,AI,地緣政治,台積電,獲利上修,操作策略

news.Title: 高含金量台股高息ETF 嗨翻
news.Content: 在中東戰火頻傳當下，具備高現金股利、高殖利率的金融族群也可望成為資金避風港，加上中信金法說會上表示稅後獲利續創歷史新高，每股盈餘（EPS）4.08元同步創高，市場預估今年中信金股利將可 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 在中東戰火頻傳當下，具備高現金股利、高殖利率的金融族群也可望成為資金避風港。
• 中信金表示，稅後獲利續創歷史新高，EPS達4.08元，預估今年股利將可望挑戰新高。
• 持有中信金比例最高的高息ETF為群益台灣精選高息（00919），持有近13.4％。
• 謝明志表示，投資不能沒有AI，也不能只有AI，適度的產業分散，高息股的誘因除了穩定領息，跟漲抗跌的特性也是重點。
news.Keywords: 金融股,高股息ETF,00919,中信金,AI,產業分散

news.Title: 主動式台股ETF夯 台積等七檔成標配
news.Content: 上周一口氣有主動摩根台灣鑫收（00401A）、主動國泰動能高息（00400A）2檔主動式台股ETF掛牌，整體台股主動式ETF已來到14檔，受益人數飛越111萬人，規 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 上周一口氣有主動摩根台灣鑫收（00401A）、主動國泰動能高息（00400A）2檔主動式台股ETF掛牌，整體台股主動式ETF已來到14檔，受益人數飛越111萬人，規模突破2,713億元。
• 檢視14檔主動式ETF的資金動向，台達電（2308）、台積電（2330）及智邦（2345）等7檔個股，成為了所有主動式台股ETF標配。
• 摩根00401A是首檔紀律性執行掩護性買權策略的台股ETF，策略主要常態性維持20-25％的部位於「賣出」掩護性買權操作。
• 國泰00400A透過「打包AI產業鏈」的基金配置，確保無論AI浪潮如何輪動，皆有望捕捉台廠從上游晶片設計到下游系統整合的增長紅利。
news.Keywords: 台股ETF,主動式ETF,00401A,00400A,台積電,台達電,智邦,AI

news.Title: 台股再戰新高 緊盯3指標
news.Content: 市場靜待美伊談判後的變化，資金重返風險資產，台股10日風光寫收盤新高，距歷史高點僅差161點，法人表示本周台股能否突破35,579點歷史高點並續創新高，將觀察「三大 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 市場靜待美伊談判後的變化，資金重返風險資產，台股10日風光寫收盤新高，距歷史高點僅差161點。
• 法人表示本周台股能否突破35,579點歷史高點並續創新高，將觀察「三大關鍵指標」：美債殖利率、荷姆茲海峽現況及台積電法說會。
• 永豐投顧認為，台股下跌風險有限，戰爭延續風險不需額外擔憂，主要考量台股本波由AI供應鏈強力帶動。
• 富邦期貨分析師曹富凱建議，外資現貨明顯回補，美伊首談破局加上35,000點以上面臨兆元賣壓，建議操作上除持有現貨，也可賣出距歷史高點再向上5％的掩護性買權作保護。
news.Keywords: 台股,美伊談判,美債殖利率,荷姆茲海峽,台積電,法說會,AI

news.Title: 先進封裝決勝點…護國群山成形！衝刺面板化、玻璃基板
news.Content: AI運算需求持續爆發，帶動先進封裝邁向更大尺寸與更高整合度，台積電在先進製程與封裝雙軌領先之下，正從「護國神山」進一步擴展為「護國群山」，串聯材料、設備等供應鏈，搶攻面板級 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI運算需求持續爆發，帶動先進封裝邁向更大尺寸與更高整合度，台積電正從「護國神山」擴展為「護國群山」，串聯材料、設備等供應鏈，搶攻面板級封裝（Panel Level Packaging）與玻璃基板（Glass Substrate）新世代技術。
• 台積電CoPoS實驗線預計在6月完成，目標是降低成本及提升產能效率，以滿足AI晶片客戶龐大的需求。
• 半導體業者分析，面板化是克服先進封裝產能瓶頸方案，方形面板可大幅提升利用率與產出效率，延伸CoWoS技術路線至CoPoS，終極目標以玻璃基板取代矽中介層。
• 台廠在材料端由山太士提供Balance Film解決方案，設備端則有印能科技等廠商，協助處理大面積封裝所帶來的翹曲與均勻性問題。
news.Keywords: 台積電,先進封裝,面板級封裝,玻璃基板,AI,供應鏈,CoPoS

news.Title: 大摩押寶台積法說 85％續漲
news.Content: 晶圓代工龍頭台積電法說會登場倒數計時，外資圈摩拳擦掌，摩根士丹利證券依傳統慣例做出三大情境預測，預料股價在法說會後有85％機率續揚，短線最大漲幅上看5％，加權指數突 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 摩根士丹利證券預測台積電法說會後股價有85％機率續揚，短線最大漲幅上看5％，加權指數突破歷史新高最強奧援登場。
• 台積電16日召開法說會，多家外資調升目標價共識值上看2,700元之上。
• 摩根士丹利證券半導體產業分析師詹家鴻對台積法說會提三大情境預測，基本假設為第二季營收財測季增5％～10％、毛利率64％～65％。
• 法人持續看好AI相關趨勢，特別是先進製程、半導體設備與廠務，以及封裝測試族群。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,摩根士丹利,股價預測,AI,先進製程

財經中心／余國棟報導

根據台灣證券交易所統計，115年4月10日發行量加權股價指數收盤為35,417.83點，較(115年4月2日)的32,572 ...

news.Title: Bull vs. Bear: Is Meta Platforms a Buy or Sell?
news.Content: In an ongoing series of articles examining the bullish and bearish cases for some well-known stocks, today I look at Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) . Lately, the company's operational performance and stock performance have been going in opposite directions. This indicates investors are torn about Meta and its stock's potential performance. So, which investors are right, the bulls or the bears? Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) is facing investor concerns regarding its aggressive capital expenditure (capex) ambitions in a potentially recessionary environment.
• The company's advertising business is vulnerable to SMB downturns, potentially leading to stalled top-line growth while costs increase.
• Meta's valuation is trading below other 'Magnificent Seven' members, suggesting the market perceives its earnings power as fragile.
• Despite concerns, Meta's core business with three ecosystems (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp) powered by AI offers a strong competitive moat and monetization potential.
news.Keywords: Meta Platforms, capex, advertising, AI flywheel, valuation

news.Title: Prediction: Down 30%, Tesla Stock Is Still Not a Buy Ahead of Its Earnings Later This Month
news.Content: It's been a tough start to the year for Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) stock. Its shares are off more than 30% from their highs and down nearly 25% year to date, as of this writing. Despite the dip in its stock price, I wouldn't be a buyer of the stock ahead of its earnings later this month (scheduled for after the bell on April 22). The electric vehicle (EV) maker already reported disappointing first-quarter deliveries earlier this month. The ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla (TSLA) stock is down over 30% from its highs and nearly 25% year-to-date, missing Q1 delivery and energy storage expectations.
• The core EV business is impacted by the end of federal tax credits, CEO Elon Musk's political involvement, and increased competition from China and EV upstarts.
• Tesla's future growth relies on autonomous driving, cybercabs, and robots, but the company has a history of delayed delivery on these promises.
• The stock price is largely based on future potential, while the core business struggles, and competitors like Alphabet's Waymo are gaining ground in autonomous driving.
news.Keywords: Tesla, EV market, autonomous driving, stock performance, competition

news.Title: I Don't Use the Term "Generational Buying Opportunity" Lightly. Here's Why It Applies to This Beaten-Down Tech Stock.
news.Content: In the spectrum of investor confidence, "generational buying opportunity" is a term that goes beyond a casual buy, transcends "no-brainer," and even exceeds "high conviction." It's a term I've rarely used in my financial writing, because it's reserved for a company that can anchor a stock portfolio by compounding wealth for decades. Investment opportunities of that caliber don't come around often. There are a lot of beaten-down tech stocks that are buys in today's market, but Broadcom (NASDAQ: ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom (AVGO) is considered a 'generational buying opportunity' due to its AI chip deals with Anthropic and Alphabet (Google), driving its stock up 6.2% on April 7.
• Broadcom's custom AI accelerator (XPU) solutions are seen as potentially overtaking GPU designs, with a long-standing partnership with Google for TPUs.
• The company aims for $100 billion in AI chip sales by fiscal 2027, with TPUs being a major growth driver with strong gross margins.
• Broadcom's business is balanced, with AI revenue comprising 43.5% of total revenue, while its non-AI segments provide stability and diversification.
news.Keywords: Broadcom, AI chips, custom silicon, generational opportunity, valuation

news.Title: Here is Why Qualcomm (QCOM) is One of the Best Quality Stocks to Buy
news.Content: Qualcomm Inc. (NASDAQ:QCOM) is one of the 8 Best Quality Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds . Qualcomm Inc. (NASDAQ: QCOM ) is one of the best quality stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On April 10, Reuters ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Qualcomm Inc. (QCOM) has secured a multi-year deal with Snap Inc. (SNAP) to use its Snapdragon XR processor platform for upcoming smart glasses.
• This deal marks the first major move for Snap's new Specs unit, aimed at competing with Meta's Ray-Ban AI smart glasses.
• Qualcomm chips have powered previous generations of Snap's developer-focused Spectacles, highlighting a long-standing relationship.
• Qualcomm is considered one of the best quality stocks to buy according to hedge funds, operating in mobile devices and wireless products.
news.Keywords: Qualcomm, Snap Inc., smart glasses, XR processor, mobile devices

news.Title: Here’s What The Street Thinks About Advanced Micro Devices (AMD)
news.Content: ​Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMD ) is one of the Best Growth Stocks to Buy With Highest Upside Potential . ​As of April 8, 45 of the 56 analysts covering Advanced ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) has 45 out of 56 analysts covering it with a Buy rating and a median 12-month price target of $300, implying over 35% upside.
• Citi maintained a Neutral rating but added AMD to its 'upside 30-day catalyst watch' ahead of Q1 earnings, expecting upside due to increased demand for CPUs driven by agentic AI.
• Erste Group upgraded AMD from Hold to Buy, projecting 32% YoY growth in Q1 2026 driven by demand for CPUs and GPUs in data centers and Agentic AI.
• AMD's business segments include Data Center, Client & Gaming, and Embedded, with a focus on high-performance computing and AI accelerators.
news.Keywords: Advanced Micro Devices, AMD, analyst ratings, AI demand, semiconductor

news.Title: Catalyst Alert: Alphabet Just Made Broadcom's Stock a Must-Buy
news.Content: Sometimes, news comes along that fundamentally changes how investors should view a stock moving forward. However, this news may not always be obvious. That was certainly the case when Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) revealed in a filing that it extended its agreement with Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom (AVGO) extended its agreement with Alphabet (GOOGL) to develop and supply future generations of Alphabet's Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), removing bearish concerns about Alphabet potentially switching vendors.
• The expanded partnership with Anthropic will provide 3.5 gigawatts of TPUs starting in 2027, deployed through Google Cloud and Broadcom.
• Broadcom projects $100 billion in custom AI chip revenue by fiscal 2027, with TPUs being a key growth driver with strong gross margins.
• Broadcom is gaining new ASIC customers like OpenAI, who are looking to diversify away from Nvidia GPUs.
news.Keywords: Broadcom, Alphabet, TPUs, AI chips, custom silicon

news.Title: Why Nvidia Stock May Frustrate Some Growth Investors
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) is a stock rarely associated with frustration. As the dominant producer of artificial intelligence (AI) accelerators, it has turned into one of the most successful stocks in market history. Nonetheless, growth investors have come to expect incredible returns from this stock over the long term. If looking ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) stock, despite its market leadership in AI accelerators and strong revenue growth (65% in fiscal 2026), may frustrate growth investors due to its massive market cap ($4.6 trillion).
• The law of large numbers suggests Nvidia's future performance may move closer to the mean, making a 10x return unlikely.
• While smaller companies like Micron (MU) and CoreWeave are growing faster, they face higher risks such as cyclical sell-offs or significant losses and debt.
• Nvidia offers a lower-risk growth scenario compared to smaller competitors, with a consensus 12-month price target of $274 per share (approx. 45% upside).
news.Keywords: Nvidia, growth investors, market cap, AI accelerators, risk-reward

news.Title: Micron Technology (MU) Continues to Reinvent Memory Market
news.Content: Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MU ) is one of the undervalued large cap stocks to buy . On April 6, KeyBanc Capital Markets senior analyst John Vinh reiterated an Overweight rating and $600 price target on Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU). Vinh cited a structural shift in how Micron is contracting with large cloud computing customers, or hyperscalers. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) is implementing new long-term supply agreements with hyperscalers, including pricing floors and upfront payments for capacity reservations.
• These agreements fundamentally de-risk the stock and offer unprecedented earnings visibility in the historically cyclical memory industry.
• KeyBanc analyst John Vinh expects DRAM and NAND pricing to surge 30-50% quarter-over-quarter in Q2 2026 due to tight supply and AI server demand.
• Micron is expanding beyond memory into Physical AI solutions through strategic investments like the one in SiMa.ai, aiming for long-term growth.
news.Keywords: Micron, memory market, AI servers, supply agreements, earnings visibility

news.Title: Magnificent 7 stocks are splitting again: Chart of the Day
news.Content: The stock market’s latest rally is reviving a familiar trade — but not all of the Magnificent Seven are coming along for the ride. The Nasdaq Composite ( ^IXIC ) just notched a rare eight-day winning streak, while the Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The stock market rally has divided the 'Magnificent Seven' stocks into two camps: Amazon (AMZN), Nvidia (NVDA), Alphabet (GOOGL), and Meta (META) have surged, while Tesla (TSLA), Microsoft (MSFT), and Apple (AAPL) have trailed.
• Meta (META) bounced strongly but has not fully recovered its pre-war starting point, unlike Amazon, Nvidia, and Alphabet.
• Tesla (TSLA) is the only stock in the group that fell in both the selloff and rebound periods, down 13% overall.
• The performance divergence highlights that the 'Mag 7' label is not a lasting market reality, with each stock telling a different story.
news.Keywords: Magnificent Seven, stock performance, market rally, divergence, AI

news.Title: Tesla's Big Rig Could Be a Big Success and Still Disappoint
news.Content: If at first you don't succeed, try, try again. While Tesla 's (NASDAQ: TSLA) first foray into trucks was its polarizing, entirely unsuccessful Cybertruck, its second attempt is likely to be something very different. Tesla's electric Semi, the Class 8 truck, aims to disrupt an entirely new market for the company and, hopefully, be much more successful than the Cybertruck's effort to disrupt Detroit truckmakers. Here's the problem: Expectations might be too high. In fact, even if Tesla's Semi is a big ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's electric Semi truck aims to disrupt the Class 8 truck market, but expectations may be too high, potentially disappointing investors in the near term.
• The Semi, presented in 2017, is now accelerating production with a 2026 goal of 5,000-15,000 units, but its starting price of ~$300,000 is nearly double comparable diesel trucks.
• Pilot testing shows the Semi achieving over 400 miles per run, and Tesla has reduced its weight and secured a federal EV weight exemption, achieving payload parity with diesel trucks.
• Despite annual production capacity of 50,000 trucks, investors should temper expectations for near-term sales volume, as capturing even a small market share would be a significant first step.
news.Keywords: Tesla, electric Semi, truck market, production, pricing

news.Title: Millionaire-Maker or Market Hype? The Honest Truth About Oklo
news.Content: "Irrational exuberance" was a phrase coined by Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Federal Reserve, to describe a market driven by enthusiasm rather than fundamental analysis. The term can describe any asset, whether a stock or a piece of property, whose true value is obscured by wishful thinking and bullish sentiment, which prices the asset much higher than it might actually be worth. If you ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oklo (OKLO), a nuclear start-up backed by Sam Altman, has seen its stock price fall over 40% in 2026 after a feverish rally in 2025.
• The company's micro nuclear reactor concept (Aurora powerhouse) has never been implemented at a commercial scale, leading to unknowns about profitability and customer adoption.
• Oklo carries an $8 billion market cap, double that of competitor NuScale Power (SMR), which has an NRC-approved reactor design.
• Despite strong partnerships and financing, regulatory risks and competition make Oklo a speculative investment, with ETFs potentially being a more prudent option.
news.Keywords: Oklo, nuclear reactor, Sam Altman, market cap, regulatory risk

news.Title: Iran Ceasefire, Bank Earnings and Other Key Things to Watch this Week
news.Content: Markets face extraordinary uncertainty following the collapse of lengthy U.S.-Iran diplomatic talks that ended with no deal, as Vice President J.D. Vance confirmed Iranian officials "have chosen not to accept our terms." The failed negotiations leave critical questions unanswered about whether the fragile two-week ceasefire will hold during continued diplomacy or if military operations will resume and potentially escalate. The Strait of Hormuz remains largely closed despite Tuesday's ceasefire, with U.S. Navy ships clearing mines over the weekend as global oil, natural gas, and fertilizer shortages intensify from the prolonged closure. Iranian state media cited "excessive U.S. demands" around Hormuz ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Markets face uncertainty due to the collapse of U.S.-Iran diplomatic talks, impacting oil prices and commodity supply chains.
• The Strait of Hormuz remains largely closed, intensifying shortages of oil, natural gas, and fertilizers, with oil prices remaining elevated.
• Q1 earnings season begins with major financial institutions reporting, and technology bellwethers Netflix (NFLX) and Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) will test consumer spending and semiconductor demand.
• The fragility of the ceasefire and lack of diplomatic progress suggest continued market volatility and embedded geopolitical risk premiums.
news.Keywords: geopolitical uncertainty, Iran conflict, oil prices, earnings season, market volatility

news.Title: The Cheapest "Magnificent Seven" Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Just Got Even Cheaper. Here's Why I'm Not Waiting to Buy.
news.Content: Mark Zuckerberg spent years being one of the most ridiculed CEOs in big tech -- touting augmented reality (AR) glasses, virtual offices, and a metaverse that nobody asked for. Then the billionaire entrepreneur leaned into artificial intelligence (AI), Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) stock price tripled, and Wall Street crowned him an expert in capital allocation. Now, just as Meta has become the most ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) stock has become the most attractively valued among 'Magnificent Seven' stocks based on forward earnings projections, despite recent investor sentiment shifts.
• The sell-off is attributed to concerns over Meta's aggressive capital expenditure (capex) and the vulnerability of its advertising business to SMB downturns.
• The market is conflating near-term advertising softness with long-term capital misallocation, leading to a valuation that suggests fragile earnings power.
• Meta's strong competitive moat, with three ecosystems (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp) powered by AI, and its full-funnel commerce network offer significant long-term upside potential.
news.Keywords: Meta Platforms, valuation, AI, advertising, Magnificent Seven

news.Title: Andy Jassy has great news for Amazon stock investors
news.Content: For years, Amazon has asked Wall Street to be patient. The spending is heavy, the timeline is long, and the payoff is coming. Trust the process. Andy Jassy 's annual shareholder letter, published April 9, reads differently. This time, he is not asking for patience. He is showing receipts. In the letter, Jassy put hard numbers around Amazon's AI and chip businesses for the first time, and the market responded by pushing the stock higher, CNBC noted. The numbers are large enough that investors ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon CEO Andy Jassy's shareholder letter revealed AWS's AI revenue run rate is above $15 billion, and its chip business has an annual revenue run rate above $20 billion with triple-digit growth.
• Jassy stated that Amazon plans to spend approximately $200 billion in capital expenditures in 2026, primarily on AI, chips, and infrastructure, backed by customer commitments including a $100 billion deal with OpenAI.
• The company's chip business is described as 'on fire' and could reach $50 billion in annual revenue if sold externally.
• Amazon's aggressive investment in AI is driven by the belief that it is a 'once-in-a-lifetime opportunity' with unprecedented future growth.
news.Keywords: Amazon, AWS, AI revenue, capital expenditure, chip business

news.Title: The Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Market Is Sending Mixed Signals Right Now. Here's How I'm Reading Them.
news.Content: The first quarter of 2026 has been rough on artificial intelligence (AI) stocks ... or has it? On the one hand, share prices of some of the biggest AI stocks, after years of explosive growth , are actually down so far this year. Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , for example, is down nearly 5% year to date. Will AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI stock market is showing mixed signals in Q1 2026, with some major AI stocks like Nvidia (NVDA) down year-to-date, while others like Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) and Texas Instruments (TXN) are up significantly.
• Hyperscalers like Alphabet, Apple, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft have seen their stock prices decline, while semiconductor manufacturers and industrial equipment makers are outperforming.
• The market appears to be rewarding companies directly benefiting from AI spend (chipmakers, equipment manufacturers) over those making the large capital expenditures (hyperscalers, Nvidia).
• If AI is viewed as a sustainable long-term trend, the current market behavior suggests a potential opportunity to buy the dip in AI-related stocks.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, market signals, semiconductor, hyperscalers, investment opportunity

news.Title: Is This Sector the Hidden Bottleneck of the AI Boom? (Hint: It's Not Semiconductors.)
news.Content: Data centers are driving economic growth in the U.S. Without the immense capital investments in artificial intelligence ( AI ), some analysts estimate that gross domestic product would have been flat in 2025. All these data centers require electricity and computer chips to operate. But they also require one commodity that is little discussed by the market: water. This is critical for cooling data center hardware, which generates a lot of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Water, specifically for cooling data center hardware, is emerging as a critical commodity for the AI boom, potentially benefiting water infrastructure companies.
• Xylem (XYL) sells water-focused products including transportation, treatment systems, pumps, and measurement equipment, advancing cooling technologies and recycling for AI data centers.
• Xylem's revenue grew 4% year-over-year to $2.4 billion last quarter, with net orders growing 9% year-over-year, indicating consistent growth potential.
• American Water Works (AWK), a utility, will benefit from regulated increases in returns on capital investments for water infrastructure expansion, with strong dividend growth.
news.Keywords: AI data centers, water infrastructure, Xylem, American Water Works, cooling technology

news.Title: Bull vs. Bear: Is Palantir a Buy or Sell?
news.Content: In an ongoing series of articles looking at both the bullish and bearish cases for some popular stocks, I wanted to take a look at Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) . While the stock has been one of the market's best performers over the past three years, it has also been a lightning rod of controversy, with famed investor Michael Burry publicly announcing he has bought put options on the stock and placing a $46 fair ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies is discussed as a potential buy or sell, with arguments for both bullish and bearish cases.
• The bull case highlights Palantir's strong position in AI, its indispensable role with the U.S. government, and growth in the commercial sector via its Foundry AI Platform (AIP).
• The bear case focuses on the company's high valuation (forward P/E over 111, P/S nearly 49), potential government spending lulls, and future competition in agentic AI.
• Michael Burry has publicly announced he bought put options on Palantir and set a $46 fair value.
news.Keywords: AI, valuation, government contracts, commercialization, competitive landscape

news.Title: As a Direct Challenge to Starlink, Amazon and Delta Are Teaming Up to Offer In-Flight Wi-Fi. Which Stock Will Benefit the Most?
news.Content: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) and Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) are drawing attention after the two companies announced a partnership to bring satellite-based in-flight Wi-Fi to 500 of Delta's planes starting in 2028. This move directly challenges SpaceX's Starlink, a satellite broadband network that uses thousands of low-Earth orbit satellites to deliver high-speed, low-latency internet globally. news.Title: Micron Is Investing in SiMa.ai. What Does That Mean for MU Stock?
news.Content: After a stellar run over the past year, fueled by the artificial intelligence (AI) boom, leading semiconductor giant Micron Technology (MU) is leaning even further into the trend, and investors are paying close attention. On Apr. 8, Micron shares jumped 7.72% after the company announced a strategic investment in SiMa.ai, a fast-growing player in Physical AI. The goal is to boost the production of advanced AI solutions designed for real-world use cases such as robotics, autonomous systems, and industrial automation. This partnership combines SiMa.ai’s powerful Modalix MLSoC architecture with Micron’s LPDDR5X memory, delivering faster performance, higher bandwidth, and lower power ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) announced a strategic investment in SiMa.ai, a Physical AI company, to enhance AI solutions for robotics and autonomous systems.
• This partnership combines SiMa.ai's Modalix MLSoC architecture with Micron's LPDDR5X memory for faster performance, higher bandwidth, and lower power consumption, crucial for edge AI workloads.
• Micron is expanding beyond memory into Physical AI, strengthening its position in the evolving AI landscape and opening new growth avenues.
• Micron's shares have rallied significantly, driven by AI demand, bullish analyst calls, and improving macro sentiment, with Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings shattering expectations.
news.Keywords: Micron, SiMa.ai, AI, physical AI, memory solutions

news.Title: Is a Foldable iPhone a Reason to Buy Apple's Stock?
news.Content: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) is no longer at the forefront of innovation, having taken on the role of waiting for competitors to pioneer new technologies before looking to perfect them for its own devices. The company has taken the same approach with foldable phones. Foldable smartphones ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple is expected to introduce a foldable iPhone later this year, entering a market pioneered by competitors.
• The foldable iPhone is projected to cost over $2,000 and may appeal to the Chinese market where foldables are popular.
• The device could drive sales and attract more users to Apple's ecosystem, leading to increased subscription and services revenue.
• While a positive addition, the stock's primary appeal remains its strong compounding business model, not just this hardware launch.
news.Keywords: Foldable iPhone, product innovation, ecosystem lock-in, China market, services revenue

news.Title: Apple is closing down first of its U.S. stores
news.Content: Apple has not had many public labor fights, but its latest just got a lot harder to ignore. The company confirmed on April 9 that it will permanently close its store at Towson Town Center in Maryland in June. The store will not be replaced. The Towson location was the first Apple retail store in the United States to unionize, making the closure one of the most closely watched labor moments in tech retail in years. Why the Towson Apple store mattered Workers at the Towson location voted to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple is closing its first U.S. unionized store in Towson, Maryland, in June, alongside two other U.S. stores.
• The union representing the Towson workers calls the closure a 'union busting' attempt, while Apple cites declining mall conditions.
• Unlike employees at the other closing stores who are offered transfers, Towson workers must apply for open roles, a distinction the union disputes.
• The closure raises questions about labor relations within major tech companies, especially given the store's unionization milestone in 2022 and a ratified contract in August 2024.
news.Keywords: Labor relations, unionization, store closure, retail strategy, employee rights

news.Title: 11 Words From the March Fed Minutes That May Come Back to Haunt Wall Street
news.Content: For much of the last seven years, the bulls have ruled the roost on Wall Street. The S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) has rallied at least 16% in six of the previous seven years (2019-2021 and 2023-2025), while the Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) and Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) have also normalized double-digit annual returns. Although the stock market ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Recent Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) minutes suggest inflation may be more persistent than anticipated, posing a risk to the stock market.
• The Iran war's impact on energy supply and prices is a key factor contributing to potential inflation persistence.
• This persistence, combined with sticky tariffs, could lead the Fed to raise interest rates instead of cutting them, contrary to prior investor expectations.
• The market's expectation of rate cuts was a significant driver of its high valuation, and their absence could lead to a significant correction.
news.Keywords: Inflation, interest rates, Fed minutes, geopolitical risk, market valuation

news.Title: Here's the Real Reason SpaceX Is Teaming Up With Intel on Terafab
news.Content: Two weeks ago, Elon Musk introduced Terafab. The Terafab venture is Musk's ambition to produce semiconductors for his companies Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and SpaceX, which recently merged with xAI before its upcoming initial public offering (IPO). Musk believes he's going to need lots of chips, and by "lots of chips," he means lots of chips -- as in, a terawatt of compute per year . To keep that in perspective, the current output of all leading-edge artificial intelligence ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel is joining Elon Musk's Terafab venture, aimed at producing semiconductors for Tesla and SpaceX, requiring a terawatt of compute per year.
• Intel announced a breakthrough in ultrathin gallium nitride (GaN) chiplets, allowing for low-cost production and integration of GaN power electronics with silicon logic on the same chiplet.
• This GaN technology is particularly relevant for SpaceX's needs due to its radiation tolerance for space applications.
• The partnership and technological advancement position Intel to potentially supply critical components for high-demand AI and space applications.
news.Keywords: Semiconductor manufacturing, Terafab, GaN chiplets, Intel Foundry, SpaceX

news.Title: 3 Top Stocks to Buy to Invest in Anthropic’s Project Glasswing
news.Content: Anthropic, the company behind the Claude family of models, is stepping into a more critical role in the artificial intelligence (AI) race – one that goes beyond building intelligence to securing it. Its latest initiative, Project Glasswing, is a cybersecurity-focused effort powered by its most advanced model, Claude Mythos Preview, built to detect and even exploit software vulnerabilities at a level that rivals top human experts. The goal is to use AI offensively to strengthen defenses before bad actors can catch up. Glasswing is not a solo play. It brings together a deep bench of partners, including Microsoft Corporation (MSFT), ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Anthropic's Project Glasswing, a cybersecurity initiative using AI to detect and exploit software vulnerabilities, partners with Microsoft (MSFT), Broadcom (AVGO), and NVIDIA (NVDA).
• Cybersecurity, currently 5% of IT budgets, could double due to AI-driven threats, making companies involved in Project Glasswing potential beneficiaries.
• Microsoft (MSFT) is a tech giant with a $2.75 trillion market cap, strong cloud (Azure) and AI integration, but its stock has seen recent declines due to AI spending concerns.
• Broadcom (AVGO) is a key player in AI infrastructure, providing custom AI chips and networking solutions, with strong growth prospects and a reasonable valuation.
news.Keywords: Anthropic, Project Glasswing, cybersecurity, AI, Microsoft, Broadcom, Nvidia

news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) is an important technology. However, like the internet, it seems investors have pushed AI stocks to the point where an investment bubble has formed. If you are worried about that outcome, as well, you may want to do the smart thing and focus on safer ...

• Procter & Gamble is a consumer staples company with a reliable business model and a history of dividend increases.
• Realty Income is a large net lease REIT offering stable income and a high dividend yield.

news.Content: There are countless ways to invest in artificial intelligence (AI). You can purchase companies that are creating AI software, businesses that are building AI computing units, or ones that support the infrastructure necessary for AI to thrive. All of these businesses have their pros ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: 台積電法說周四登場 外界聚焦斷鏈等五大議題
news.Content: 台積電 (2330-TW)(TSM-US) 將於本周四 (16 日) 召開法說會，成為本季 AI 產業的風向球。外界除關注財報與展望 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電(2330-TW)(TSM-US)將於本周四 (16 日) 召開法說會，成為本季 AI 產業的風向球。
• 市場聚焦五大重點：美中關稅政策對客戶下半年拉貨需求的衝擊、CoWoS先進封裝擴產節奏、海外廠高成本結構對毛利率的影響、第二季財測指引、以及地緣政治不確定下維持53%以上毛利率目標的對策。
• 法人預期，儘管智慧型手機產業遭遇逆風，但在 AI 需求帶動下，3 奈米等先進製程產能滿載，台積電營收仍可望季增約 10% 以內，毛利率維持高點約 66%。
• 台積電資本支出預估將提高至 520 億至 560 億美元，重點投資 3 奈米、2 奈米與先進封裝。

news.Title: 2 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks to Buy Before They Soar 35% and 62%, According to 1 Wall Street Analyst
news.Content: Large tech and artificial intelligence (AI) stocks have run into a bit of a wall this year, as investors question how long the AI capital expenditure spree can continue. The Iran war hasn't helped, either. But among the sell-off, Wall Street analysts see buying opportunities that they think will pay off over the next 12 to 18 months. Recently, KeyBanc analyst John Vinh released several research reports highlighting buying opportunities in two stocks in the AI ecosystem: Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) and Micron ...
news.AI_Summary:
• KeyBanc analyst John Vinh maintains an overweight rating on Intel, raising the price target to $70, indicating 35% upside.
• Vinh also reiterates an overweight rating on Micron with a $600 price target, implying 62% upside.
• Intel is benefiting from growing demand for server CPUs driven by AI-agent workloads, with expected price increases of 10-15% in Q2.
• Micron is expected to see continued demand for DRAM and NAND, with prices projected to rise 30-50% in Q2, despite concerns about customer price tolerance.
news.Keywords: Analyst upgrade, price target, CPU demand, AI hardware, memory market

news.Title: SpaceX Could Be the Ultimate Meme Stock. Investors Should Avoid This Unprecedented IPO.
news.Content: The SpaceX initial public offering (IPO) is coming, and it's going to be massive. Media reports indicate that SpaceX has confidentially filed for its IPO, seeking to raise as much as $75 billion at a valuation that could be in the range of $1.75 trillion to $2 trillion, which would make it the largest IPO in history and instantly put in an elite group of stocks with over a $1 trillion market cap. SpaceX is a one-of-a-kind company. It uses reusable rockets to help launch astronauts into space, and has also set up a low-orbit network of satellites ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is preparing for a massive IPO, potentially raising $75 billion at a valuation of $1.75-$2 trillion, making it the largest IPO in history.
• The article advises investors to avoid the IPO, suggesting SpaceX could initially be a 'meme stock' driven by retail investors and hype, trading at high multiples (nearly 219x trailing earnings).
• SpaceX's potential is immense, but the valuation seems 'mind-boggling' given its current financials ($8 billion profit on $16 billion revenue in 2025).
• Investors are cautioned that IPOs often see price drops after lock-up periods expire, suggesting patience may be rewarded.

Media reports indicate that SpaceX has confidentially filed for its IPO, seeking to raise as much as $75 billion at a valuation that could be in the range of $1.75 trillion to $2 trillion, which would make it the largest IPO in history and instantly put in an elite group of stocks with over a $1 trillion market cap. SpaceX is a one-of-a-kind company. It uses reusable rockets to help launch astronauts into space, and has also set up a low-orbit network of satellites ...

news.Title: Is Palantir a Millionaire-Maker Stock?
news.Content: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) was one of big tech's top performers in 2025, with shares soaring 148% that year. But does it have what it takes to maintain this millionaire-maker momentum? Will AI create the world's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies (PLTR) showed strong performance in 2024 (341% gain) and 2025 (148% gain), driven by AI and data analytics.

news.Title: Have President Donald Trump's Actions in Iran Done Irreparable Damage to the Stock Market? One Data Point Tells the Tale.
news.Content: For most of President Donald Trump's tenure in the White House, the stock market has excelled . The widely followed Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) , benchmark S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) , and technology-dominated Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) surged 57%, 70%, and 142%, respectively, during his first term, and were all up by double digits through year one of his second, non-consecutive term. But pullbacks, stock market corrections , bear markets, and crashes are par for the course ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Iran war, initiated by President Trump, has caused significant energy supply disruptions and soaring crude oil prices, leading to increased inflation.
• Inflation is projected to reach 3.56% in April, posing a major headwind for the historically pricey stock market.
• The stock market's high valuation was partly based on expectations of Federal Reserve rate cuts, which are now uncertain due to persistent inflation.
• The damage from the Iran conflict and sticky inflation could be irreparable for the current bull market, potentially leading to a significant downturn.
news.Keywords: Geopolitical risk, inflation, energy prices, stock market, Federal Reserve

news.Content: Duolingo (NASDAQ: DUOL) operates the world's largest digital language-education platform. news.Title: 美伊緊張！財經名嘴：台積電很香 但該衝的是「這檔」
news.Content: 在中東地緣政治風險升溫之際，市場資金動向再度成為關注焦點。美國財經媒體CNBC「名嘴」克萊默（Jim Cramer）在談及伊朗戰事對市場的影響時，再度點名台積電，可是在回應投資人提問時，卻給出一個看似矛盾的建 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 在中東地緣政治風險升溫之際，華爾街名嘴克萊默（Jim Cramer）再度點名台積電，但建議投資人轉向近期股價回檔的輝達（NVIDIA）。
• 克萊默認為，輝達近期大幅下跌，使其成為被冷落的個股，但在AI需求持續升溫的背景下，這類標的重新受到資金評估。
• 台積電作為全球最大半導體製造商，其財報表現已明確展現產業動能，今年資本支出預估落在520億至560億美元，年增幅達27%至37%。
• 管理層明確指出，需求相當火熱，預期全球晶片供需要到2028年至2029年才可能達到平衡，意味半導體產業仍處於長期擴張階段。

news.Title: The Best Way to Invest in OpenAI and ChatGPT Before Its IPO
news.Content: OpenAI, the creators of ChatGPT, isn't a tradable stock on the market. While there are rumors swirling about when it could have an initial public offering (IPO), there's no great way to invest in the stock outside of private-party sales. However, I think there's a far ...

news.Title: Got $1,000? This Pick-and-Shovel Growth Stock Could Be a Long-Term Winner
news.Content: Investors have plenty of ways to play the artificial intelligence (AI) boom. Software, hardware, cloud computing, energy, and data center companies all offer growth potential. But one key player is often overlooked: the company that manufactures most of the chips powering data centers. Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE: TSM) delivered strong results in 2025, and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC) is a leading 'pick-and-shovel' play in the AI infrastructure buildout, manufacturing most data center chips.
• TSMC expects sustained demand for AI processors, projecting over 50% annualized growth in AI chips through 2029.
• The company holds a dominant market share (72%) with high profit margins (45%) and significant production capacity (over 17 million wafers annually).
• Despite competition and industry cyclicality risks, TSMC's valuation (23x forward P/E) is considered compelling for long-term AI growth.
news.Keywords: Semiconductor manufacturing, AI chips, data centers, market share, valuation

news.Title: 5 big analyst AI moves: Upgrades for TXN and DDOG; Further upside seen in SNDK
news.Content: Investing.com -- Here are the biggest analyst moves in the area of artificial intelligence (AI) for this week. Bernstein raises SanDisk target to $1,250, lays out $3,000 blue-sky case Bernstein raised its price target on SanDisk to $1,250 from $1,000 and reiterated its Outperform rating, calling the stock its top short-term pick. In a more aggressive scenario, analyst Mark Newman laid out a blue-sky valuation of $3,000 — implying roughly 250% upside from current levels. Newman’s core argument is that the market is significantly undervaluing SanDisk’s earnings power. The stock pulled back roughly 19% after Google unveiled TurboQuant, a memory-compression ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Bernstein raises SanDisk's price target to $1,250, with a blue-sky case of $3,000, citing undervaluation of its earnings power.
• Fears of weakening NAND demand due to Google's TurboQuant are considered 'overdone', as the technology primarily impacts HBM for AI inference.
• Newman estimates Q3 adjusted EPS at $14.18 and Q4 at $25.30, driven by a projected 40% sequential increase in ASPs.
• The stock trades at 9x forward earnings, below historical upcycle ranges, suggesting the market undervalues the sustainability of the current NAND cycle.
news.Keywords: NAND flash, AI inference, earnings estimates, valuation, semiconductor cycle

news.Title: Nvidia Built an AI Chip Empire. But It's This Other Creation That Makes the Stock a Screaming Buy Today.
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) is known for its artificial intelligence (AI) chips. These graphics processing units (GPUs) power some of the most critical tasks in the field, from training large language models to putting them to work. And this has helped the tech giant increase its revenue to mind-boggling levels: In the latest quarter, revenue surged 73% to $68 billion, and analysts expect the pace to continue. Forecasts for the current quarter call for a 77% increase in revenue. Of course, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's revenue surged 73% to $68 billion in the latest quarter, with forecasts predicting a 77% increase for the current quarter.
• The company's CUDA parallel computing platform, with over 100 million installations, is identified as a significant competitive advantage (moat).
• CUDA enabled Nvidia's GPUs to expand from gaming into high-growth areas like AI, powering applications across various industries.
• Nvidia's strong performance and the deep integration of CUDA into the AI ecosystem make its stock a compelling buy.

news.Title: Could Trump Ignite a Stock Market Rally by Suspending Tariffs?
news.Content: President Trump watches the stock market. If you want proof, all you have to do is look through his social media posts. Or you can watch his 2026 State of the Union message, where he proclaimed, "The stock market is at 53 all-time record highs since the election." The president has seemed in the past to use the stock market as a barometer of sorts of his administration's performance. But that raises a question about what he might do if stocks are in a bear market as the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• President Trump has previously used the stock market's performance as a measure of his administration's success.
• Suspending tariffs could potentially ignite a stock market rally by boosting corporate earnings and giving the Federal Reserve more flexibility for rate cuts.
• Companies in sectors like apparel (Nike) and industrials (Caterpillar) could benefit, while some tariff-advantaged stocks might see rotation.

news.Keywords: Trade policy, tariffs, stock market rally, Federal Reserve, geopolitical risk

news.Title: Is SpaceX Really Worth More Than Tesla? Here's the Unvarnished Truth.
news.Content: Only five U.S. companies have market caps of more than $2 trillion. That number will soon increase to six. Elon Musk's SpaceX is targeting a valuation of more than $2 trillion when it goes public later this year, making it the highest-valued IPO stock ever. However, the company that has been Musk's biggest success story so far -- Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) -- isn't a member of the $2 trillion club. Is SpaceX really worth more than Tesla? Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is targeting a valuation of over $2 trillion for its upcoming IPO, potentially exceeding Tesla's market cap.
• SpaceX's businesses (Starlink, commercial launch, potential space commercialization) and its merger with AI company xAI present significant growth opportunities.
• Tesla faces EV market fatigue and declining sales, but has strong free cash flow and potential in robotaxis and humanoid robots (Optimus).
• The comparison hinges on whether investors prioritize long-term disruption potential (SpaceX) or established financial metrics and diversification (Tesla).
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, space industry, electric vehicles, AI, market comparison

news.Content: Nebius Group (NASDAQ: NBIS) is among the neocloud companies that have emerged during the artificial intelligence (AI) and data center boom. news.AI_Summary:

Will AI ...

台積電（ 2330 ）將於4月16日下午2時舉行2026年第一季法人說明會，由董事長魏哲家及財務長黃仁昭共同主持。

• 台積電已於4月10日公布第一季自結營收，合併營收達新台幣1兆1,341億元，年增35.1%，創下單季歷史新高，顯示AI晶片需求未見降溫。

With earnings expected to rise sharply this year and next, ...

news.Title: 台股一週「漲逾2845.4點」！投信曝「最佳買點」
news.Content:
財經中心／李明融報導

台股多頭氣勢如虹！根據最新統計，台股加權指數本週大漲2845.4點、漲幅高達8.74%，位居全球第四。若以2026年以來計算，台股累計大漲22.28%，高居亞洲股市漲 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股加權指數本週大漲2845.4點、漲幅高達8.74%，位居全球第四。截至4月9日為止，台股收在3萬5417.83點，創下史上最高收盤紀錄。
• 台新2000高科技基金經理人沈建宏分析，近期漲勢主因在於中東局勢出現重大轉機，美伊達成兩週停火協議，帶動美股四大指數勁揚。
• 儘管展望樂觀，但籌碼面仍存在隱憂。沈建宏指出，3月單月外資賣超高達9682億元，逼近1兆元大關，顯示技術面乖離過大，外資避險需求同步增加。
• 展望未來一週，台新投信認為，隨著4月中下旬美台財報週及法說會登場，有望釋出更多利多。操作上建議留意「個股表現優於大盤」，法人持續看好AI供應鏈（材料升級、電力革新）、光通訊、半導體設備、低軌衛星及機器人與自駕等題材。
news.Keywords: 台股,週漲幅,中東局勢,外資賣超,AI供應鏈,光通訊,半導體設備

news.Title: 2 AI Stocks I Don't Like (Including Palantir) and 1 I Love
news.Content: Many software stocks have nosedived this year, helped by particularly aggressive declines last week, amid shifting market sentiment -- and artificial intelligence (AI) market darlings have not been immune to the pullback. Several popular growth companies from the past year suffered steep declines, with Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) and Snowflake (NYSE: SNOW) selling off especially hard last week. Given the recent volatility, market participants might want to take a moment to consider if there are any good buying opportunities. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir's Q4 2025 revenue reached $1.41 billion, a 70% increase year-over-year, with U.S. commercial up 137%.
• The article views Palantir's P/E ratio (over 200) and forward P/E (near 100) as excessively high.
• Snowflake reported Q4 product revenue of $1.23 billion (up 30% YoY) and $9.77 billion in remaining performance obligations.
• Snowflake's full-year fiscal 2026 operating loss was $1.44 billion, indicating a lack of profitability.
• Amazon's Q4 2025 net sales were $213.4 billion (up 14% YoY), with AWS revenue at $35.6 billion (up 24% YoY).
news.Keywords: AI platforms, software valuation, operating loss, cloud revenue, e-commerce

news.Title: 買進台積電時機到了？外媒揭「驚人上漲空間」
news.Content:
財經中心／李明融報導

受到中東局勢升溫以及全球能源危機影響，台股近期回落震盪，就連全球晶圓代工龍頭台積電（2330）一度跌到每股1760元，不過隨著伊朗、美國停戰出現曙光，台積電週五 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受到中東局勢升溫以及全球能源危機影響，台股近期回落震盪，台積電一度跌到每股1760元，但隨著停戰曙光，週五（10日）跳空站回每股2000元大關。
• 加上原先人工智慧（AI）強勁需求，台積電第一季財報表現備受市場期待，外媒與華爾街分析師普遍看好其長期護城河優勢，揭開未來一年「驚人上漲空間」，給予「強烈買入」評級。
• 台積電預計於4月16日發布第一季財報，其3月營收高達新台幣4151億9100萬元，年增率45.2%，寫下史上最強單月紀錄。
• 華爾街分析師普遍看好其長期競爭力，平均目標價為419.38美元，最高目標價則上看520美元，潛在漲幅可達40%。
news.Keywords: 台積電,AI,財報,華爾街,目標價,中東局勢,上漲空間

news.Title: 中東炸裂「閉眼灌台積電」？華爾街專家揭「抱這檔更香」逆風真相曝
news.Content:
財經中心／綜合報導

中東地緣政治風險升溫，市場資金流向再度引發關注，美國財經媒體指出，華爾街名嘴、CNBC主持人克萊默（Jim Cramer）近日 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 中東地緣政治風險升溫，美國財經媒體指出，華爾街名嘴克萊默（Jim Cramer）再度點名台積電，但建議投資人轉向近期股價回檔的輝達（NVIDIA）。
• 克萊默認為，輝達近期大幅下跌，「突然變成一檔不受青睞的個股，這正是你應該買進的時候」，認為在AI需求持續升溫背景下，資金正重新評估半導體族群的投資節奏。
• 台積電強勁的財報表現，有助於提振市場對AI產業鏈的信心，認為台積電釋出的訊號顯示，AI晶片需求仍處於高度成長期。
• 公司今年資本支出預估落在520億至560億美元，年增幅達27%至37%，管理層更直言，全球晶片供需恐要到2028年至2029年才可能趨於平衡。
news.Keywords: 台積電,輝達,NVIDIA,AI,克萊默,地緣政治,資本支出

news.Title: Alphabet vs. Oracle: Here's What the Debt Market Is Saying
news.Content: The market is, completely understandably, focused on artificial intelligence (AI) hyperscalers to determine whether there's an AI bubble brewing. Those concerns are magnified by the share price performance of the leading hyperscaler companies in 2026 (see chart). The two that stand out the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The debt market shows less concern for Alphabet and Microsoft's default risk compared to Oracle.
• Oracle's $300 billion cloud computing agreement with OpenAI is a key point of market concern for earnings potential.
• Microsoft's significant exposure to OpenAI (45% of RPO) also raises questions about the returns on AI infrastructure spending.
• OpenAI's recent $122 billion funding round (at $852 billion valuation) indicates continued investor confidence in AI growth.
• The analysis suggests favoring well-funded companies like Alphabet, which leads in AI model development, over Oracle.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, debt markets, credit risk, hyperscaler strategy, OpenAI

news.Title: The 30% Dip in Tesla Rippled Across EV Stocks. These 2 Stocks Are Worth Catching.
news.Content: The past few months have been challenging for Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) shareholders. Shares of the electric vehicle (EV) giant are down roughly 30% from their December peak. This sharp correction has rippled across other major EV stocks as well. Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) , for example, has also seen its shares lose roughly one-third of their value since late December. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? • The company benefits from integrated manufacturing, extensive data, and cost advantages.
• The massive potential of the robotaxi market suggests significant future upside for Tesla.

news.Title: Agentic AI Is the Next Big Thing in AI. Here Are the 5 Best Stocks to Capitalize on It.
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) technology is starting to expand beyond chatbots. What's coming next is agentic AI -- software that can independently perform complex tasks on your behalf with only minimal instructions beforehand. In the coding world, AI agents are already being used widely, and that same type of automation is likely coming to other parts of the economy. These five companies are well ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Agentic AI, capable of independent task execution, is emerging as a major AI trend.
• Nvidia's GPUs are highlighted as key hardware for handling the diverse processing needs of agentic AI.
• Broadcom's custom ASICs provide optimized performance for specific AI applications.
• Amazon AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud are essential infrastructure providers for agentic AI.
• Strong revenue growth rates (AWS 24%, Azure 39%, Google Cloud 48%) underscore the demand for AI computing power.
news.Keywords: AI technology, hardware acceleration, cloud services, infrastructure buildout, market growth

news.Title: ‘Big Short’ Michael Burry sends signal on Nvidia stock
news.Content: Short-seller Michael Burry just made his view on Nvidia ( NVDA ) stock a lot harder to ignore. In a new Substack post , the popular investor disclosed that he added to his bearish Nvidia position , loading up more on long-dated puts, with the stock still at the heart of the AI rally. At the same time, he scooped up shares in the biggest Chinese tech companies, such as Alibaba and JD.com . For perspective, Nvidia stock has had a forgettable run of late. It’s tracking in the red over the past six months, down 2% and only up ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Michael Burry has increased his bearish position on Nvidia stock by acquiring long-dated put options.
• Burry's bearish thesis on Nvidia is based on valuation concerns and questions about the durability of AI-driven data center spending.
• Nvidia's fiscal 2026 sales grew 65%, with Q4 up 73%, but the company has significant supply obligations.
• Hedge funds have reportedly been cutting exposure to Nvidia stock at the fastest pace in 13 years.

news.Title: 2.5 Billion Reasons Apple Might Be the Best Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock to Buy Today
news.Content: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) is no longer the most valuable company in the world, a title it held for quite some time before being displaced by Nvidia last year. However, it's still a global tech leader, and even though it's not at the forefront of artificial intelligence (AI), it has an edge in the space. Here's why. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple has 2.5 billion active devices, providing a large installed user base for AI engagement.
• The company's AI strategy, including a deal with Alphabet for Gemini LLM, is seen as a 'smarter approach' compared to peers' massive investments.
• iPhone sales increased 23% year-over-year in Q1, and total sales increased 16%, indicating continued strong performance.
• Apple's AI platform integrates into its ecosystem, leveraging its hardware lead and user satisfaction.
news.Keywords: active devices, AI platform, ecosystem integration, LLM partnership, hardware lead

However, it's still a global tech leader, and even though it's not at the forefront of artificial intelligence (AI), it has an edge in the space. Here's why. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple has 2.5 billion active devices, providing a large installed user base for AI engagement.
• The company's AI strategy, including a deal with Alphabet for Gemini LLM, is seen as a 'smarter approach' compared to peers' massive investments.
• iPhone sales increased 23% year-over-year in Q1, and total sales increased 16%, indicating continued strong performance.
• Apple's AI platform integrates into its ecosystem, leveraging its hardware lead and user satisfaction.
news.Keywords: active devices, AI platform, ecosystem integration, LLM partnership, hardware lead

news.Title: Artifical Intelligence (AI) Stocks Are Rising on the News of an Iran War Ceasefire. Here Are 3 Great Ones to Pick Up Now.
news.Content: The market has been staging a major comeback since an Iran war ceasefire was announced last week. The S&P 500 has rebounded and is roughly flat year to date as of this writing, driven by lower oil prices and relief about what that means for the economy. Artificial intelligence (AI) stocks make up a large portion of the weighted index, and higher stock prices in the space are driving in its recovery. Oil is used for multiple purposes ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI stocks are rising following news of an Iran war ceasefire, with the S&P 500 rebounding.
• Alphabet's cloud business saw sales increase 48% year-over-year in Q4 2025, with a backlog of $240 billion.
• Nvidia's CEO estimates a $1 trillion opportunity through 2027, with sales growth accelerating and new products like the Vera Rubin line launched.
• Amazon's AWS grew 24% year-over-year in Q4, on a base of $35.6 billion, with expected capex of $200 billion in 2026.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, ceasefire rally, cloud growth, semiconductor opportunity, data center spending

news.Title: Prediction: The Best-Performing Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock of Q2 2026 Isn't Nvidia. It's This One.
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) pioneer Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) had a poor start to 2026, with shares of the chip giant dropping 6.5% in the first quarter despite the healthy growth the company has been clocking. The drop in Nvidia stock seems unjustified, as it expects growth to accelerate this year due to robust demand for its latest ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk (SNDK) is presented as a potentially better-performing AI stock than Nvidia in Q2 2026.
• Sandisk's stock jumped 167% in Q1, significantly outperforming Nvidia's 6.5% drop.
• NAND flash prices are expected to increase by 70%-75% in Q2, driving Sandisk's earnings growth.
• Sandisk's Q2 fiscal 2026 non-GAAP earnings per share increased 5 times year-over-year to $6.20.
news.Keywords: AI stock performance, NAND flash prices, earnings growth, valuation, market outperformance

news.Title: Andy Jassy Just Announced Wonderful News for Amazon Stock Investors
news.Content: Investors who have held Amazon 's (NASDAQ: AMZN) shares for a long time are sitting pretty, as the company has delivered life-changing returns over the past two decades. It now sits as one of the largest corporations in the world with a market cap of $2.6 trillion. But you don't need a time machine to still profit from Amazon, as the tech leader has attractive opportunities that could allow it to post outstanding returns, once again, over the next 20 years. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon has a market cap of $2.6 trillion and significant growth opportunities in e-commerce and cloud computing.
• CEO Andy Jassy highlighted that 80% of global retail sales still occur in physical stores and 85% of global IT spend remains on-premises.
• Amazon's strong brand, infrastructure, network effects, and high switching costs for AWS create a wide moat.
• The stock is considered attractive for long-term investors amid market volatility due to geopolitical and macroeconomic factors.
news.Keywords: e-commerce, cloud computing, market share, competitive moat, long-term prospects

news.Title: 熱錢回頭 台股再戰高點
news.Content: 美伊戰事停火兩周，雙方正式進入談判階段，賦予多頭喘息空間，資金再度湧向風險性資產，外資近一周強力回補台股逾1,800億元，創單周新高，法人看好短線熱錢效應延續，有利於大盤向上挑戰高 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊戰事停火，資金回流風險性資產，外資近一周強力回補台股逾1,800億元，創單周新高。
• 台股清明連假後反彈強勁，指數周漲2,845點，外資買盤回補1,884.57億元，主要買盤集中在AI題材相關的電子股。
• 法人預期，台積電法說將繳出亮眼財報，上半年EPS有機會達45元以上，有助推升大盤挑戰新高。
• 美10年期公債殖利率是資金流向重要指標，若落在4.0％～4.3％之間，指數區間約在31,529點到34,500點。
news.Keywords: 熱錢回流,外資買盤,AI題材,台積電法說,殖利率

news.Title: 準優勝者》趙彭博台積電領軍 半導體扮多頭
news.Content: 近期全球金融市場在多空交錯中逐步轉向偏多格局。國際政經方面，川普宣布同意短期停火兩周，並表達美伊關係將朝合作方向推進，市場對中東地緣政 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 國際政經局勢緩和，市場風險偏好回升，資金重返股市，台股由防禦轉為進攻格局，多頭趨勢逐步確立。
• 在國際局勢緩和、資金環境偏寬鬆及科技產業成長背景下，加權指數有機會挑戰歷史新高點35,579點。
• 美國3月PMI維持擴張，科技企業財報穩定，聯準會暫不升息訊號，有利股市延續多頭格局。
• 台積電法說會受高度關注，外資給予3,000元以上目標價，半導體族群扮演多頭核心，並向供應鏈擴散。
news.Keywords: 地緣政治風險降溫,資金回流,科技股財報,貨幣政策,台積電展望

news.Title: 挑戰者》林漢偉三大利多助攻 台股拚新高
news.Content: 上周台股清明變盤向上，周K上漲2,845點或8.74％，10日漲556點，收35,417點，收盤創下歷史新高。上周台股受惠電子股強勢，台達電、台光電、貿 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股上周清明變盤向上，收盤創下歷史新高35,417點，電子股強勢，台達電、台光電等龍頭創下新高。
• 本周關注美伊停火協議、台積電法說及美股財報，費半指數創高，台積電3月營收歷史新高，有利挑戰36,000點。
• 指數技術面轉強，日K連四紅搭配成交量能擴增到8,000億元以上，顯示多頭攻勢啟動。
• 矽光子、PCB、載板族群表現強勢創高，反映AI需求帶動營收成長，法人看好優質公司有往上操作空間。
news.Keywords: 指數新高,電子主流回歸,台積電法說,族群輪動,法人籌碼

news.Title: 黃文清專欄－美伊戰事停火 台股登頂新高
news.Content:
美國與以色列於2月28日展開聯合軍事行動，攻擊伊朗的領導團隊、戰機、戰艦、軍事設施等目標。美伊聯軍開戰之初即取得壓性優勢，伊朗最高領導人哈米尼與多位高階官員、將領於戰事初期，即遭斬首，市場預期戰事可能在短期內結束。

然而，伊 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊戰事初期伊朗受挫，但隨後封鎖荷姆茲海峽導致油價大漲逾50%，通膨預期升溫，引發國際股市3月大跌。
• 4月以來中東戰事趨緩，國際股市逐漸回穩，但和談條件受政治壓力影響，變數仍多。
• 聯準會4月例會降息機率趨近於零，若中東戰事快速落幕且通膨下滑，川普政府可能為期中選舉降息。
• 標普500成分股2026年第一季盈餘預估上修至6,082億美元，年增14.4%，科技股盈餘成長率高達46%。
news.Keywords: 地緣政治風險,通膨預期,貨幣政策轉變,企業盈餘預期,AI產業趨勢

news.Title: 3月、首季營收吸睛 台積法說 市場聚焦未來性
news.Content: 眾所矚目的台積電2026年第一季法說會，將於4月16日登場。在3月營收創高、首季營收達1.13兆元、年增逾35％等亮麗數據帶動下，市場對本 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電3月營收創高，首季營收達1.13兆元，年增逾35%，市場聚焦毛利、獲利表現及未來成長延續性。
• 法人預期AI需求動能仍是法說最大主軸，先進製程與先進封裝產能吃緊，預計第二季營收將續創新高。
• 毛利率關注是否維持高檔，法人樂觀預期在調整報價情況下，毛利率將挑戰67%。
• 2奈米製程進入量產期，良率爬坡與客戶導入進度將影響未來數年成長曲線；主要成長引擎已轉由AI、HPC貢獻。
news.Keywords: 法說會展望,AI需求,先進製程,毛利率,資本支出

news.Title: 反攻行情旺 高科技ETF搶鏡
news.Content: 美科技股重啟攻勢，費半連日創高，投資專家指出，以標普500指數來看，預期EPS與企業利潤率維持高檔，科技股中長期成長能見度 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美科技股重啟攻勢，費半指數創高，專家預期EPS與企業利潤率維持高檔，科技股評價修復階段。
• 台積電法說領頭美台科技財報表現，AI硬體紅利股包括半導體及電力基建，景氣能見度回升。
• 統計顯示，多檔高科技ETF搭上美台科技股反攻行情，周漲幅最高達20.32%。
• 新加入戰局的ETF聚焦AI科技美股七巨頭及NASDAQ概念增長股，掌握強勢成長機會。
news.Keywords: 科技股反攻,高科技ETF,AI硬體紅利股,半導體,評價修復

news.Title: Forget Bitcoin ETFs; This Is How Crypto Is Really Going Mainstream
news.Content: Many crypto investors see exchange-traded funds (ETFs) as a sign of digital currencies going mainstream . Sure, it doesn't hurt Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) holders when the iShares Bitcoin Trust (NASDAQ: IBIT) picks up $57 billion of Bitcoin assets, followed by $13.5 billion of assets under management in the Fidelity Wise Origin Bitcoin Fund (NYSEMKT: FBTC) . The just-launched Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust will surely build serious value ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: The Final Frontier Is Becoming Big Business. Here Are 3 Space Stocks to Buy Now.
news.Content: The global space economy is booming, reaching $613 billion in 2025, as space-based advancements make the final frontier a massive opportunity for research and national security. According to McKinsey estimates, the space economy is projected to reach $1.8 trillion by 2035, representing a compound annual growth rate of over 11%. The space economy is becoming big business as the commercial sector advances technologies in launch services, satellites, imagery, and other key components needed to support space exploration. While investors are buzzing around SpaceX 's pending initial public offering, there are three space stocks you can buy right now to ...

• The global space economy is expected to grow to $1.8 trillion by 2035, with an 11% CAGR.
• Rocket Lab (RKLB) is identified as a significant player in space launch services and systems, with a backlog of $1.85 billion.
• Planet Labs utilizes AI for its Earth-imaging satellite platform and has partnered with Nvidia for on-satellite data processing.
• Lockheed Martin (LMT) is a major defense contractor with a strong presence in the space economy.
news.Keywords: space economy, growth forecast, AI applications, satellite technology, defense industry

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: AI Stocks Just Did Something That's Been Witnessed Only 4 Times in 62 Years -- Is It Finally Time to Sound the Alarm?
news.Content: Roughly three decades ago, the mainstream proliferation of the internet changed America forever. After a long wait, the next game-changing technology has arrived: artificial intelligence (AI) . Empowering software and systems with the tools to make split-second, autonomous decisions is a greater than $15 trillion global opportunity by 2030, according to PwC analysts. The rise of AI is also responsible for sending the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) , S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) , and Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) to record highs. Will AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI sector is a massive opportunity, with projections exceeding $15 trillion by 2030, contributing to market highs.
• Nvidia (NVDA) is central to AI hardware, and Palantir Technologies (PLTR) shows significant growth in AI applications.
• The current AI stock concentration in the S&P 500 (41%) mirrors historical market bubbles, suggesting potential risk.
• Aggressive valuations, such as Nvidia's P/S ratio exceeding 30 and Palantir's P/S ratio over 100, are highlighted as concerns.
news.Keywords: AI sector, market concentration, valuation, historical parallels, risk assessment

news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) company Anthropic's Claude family of large language models (LLMs) is proving highly successful, as evidenced by its latest reported financial results. Anthropic calls itself an AI safety and research company, offering solutions such as AI agents, coding, AI-based customer support, advanced reasoning, and more, while keeping ethics and safety at the center of its philosophy. news.Title: Qualcomm's CEO Says the Winner of Edge AI Will Win the Entire AI Race. Here's Why I'm Buying.
news.Content: In his public talks about the future of artificial intelligence (AI), Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM) CEO Cristiano Amon keeps coming back to one strong stance. Speaking at both Web Summit 2026 and Davos 2026, Amon argued that the AI race will be won at the edge, where devices, data, and users converge. Moreover, he says, success in this space will depend on constant reinvention, efficient on-device computing, and competition across both edge and data center inference in a market that may be overhyped in the short term but could ...

• Despite a 25% year-to-date stock decline, Qualcomm authorized a $20 billion share buyback and increased its dividend.

news.Title: Japan Bets $16 Billion to Propel Rapidus in Global AI Chip Race
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Japan approved ¥631.5 billion ($4 billion) in additional subsidies to quicken Rapidus Corp.’s entry into the high-stakes AI chipmaking arena, ramping up support for a project widely regarded as a long shot. The capital is intended to bankroll Rapidus’ work for IT firm Fujitsu Ltd., one of the initial clients that Tokyo hopes will get ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Japan is providing an additional $4 billion in subsidies to Rapidus Corp., bringing total government support to $16.3 billion by March 2027, to compete in AI chipmaking.
• Rapidus aims to produce 2-nanometer chips by 2027, challenging industry leader TSMC, and reducing Japan's reliance on foreign chip manufacturers.
• Elon Musk is also entering the AI chip race, partnering with Intel Corp. on the Terafab project for his companies.
• Despite significant government backing and partnerships (IBM, ASML), Rapidus faces technological hurdles and competition from TSMC, which is already producing 2nm chips.
news.Keywords: semiconductor manufacturing, government subsidies, AI chips, competition, technological hurdles

• 記憶體市況方面，預期9月將好轉，手機與PC容量升級帶動價格不易大幅下滑，企業級需求動能穩健。

news.Title: Want to Invest in OpenAI Before Its Blockbuster IPO? Here's How to Do It.
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) chatbot ChatGPT amassed 100 million active users just two months after launching in November 2022, becoming the fastest software application to ever achieve that milestone. Its creator, OpenAI, is now valued at $852 billion, making it one of the largest private companies in the entire world. OpenAI is reportedly exploring the possibility of an initial public offering (IPO), which would see its shares trading on the public markets sometime before the end of 2026. This will give everyday investors ...
news.AI_Summary:
• OpenAI, creator of ChatGPT, is valued at $852 billion and is reportedly considering an IPO by the end of 2026.
• Ark Investment Management has invested $240 million in OpenAI through three ETFs (ARKK, ARKW, ARKF), with exposure under 3% in each.
• OpenAI's annualized revenue is around $24 billion, but its P/S ratio of 35.5 is significantly higher than Nvidia's 19.8.
• The company is currently unprofitable and incurs high data center costs, suggesting its valuation may be stretched.
news.Keywords: private valuation, IPO prospects, AI development, P/S ratio, investment funds

news.Title: Stanley Druckenmiller Says Stablecoins Will Dominate Global Payments Within 15 Years. Are Visa and Mastercard Stock in Trouble?
news.Content: Stablecoins have made a big splash in payments. The tokens leverage the same blockchain technology as cryptocurrencies, but without the inherent volatility. Stablecoins are often pegged to fiat currencies like the U.S. dollar, meaning they try to track the currency's price at all times. While increasingly viewed as an innovative payment method, stablecoins just got a ringing endorsement from one of the best investors of all time. Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller recently said he thinks the global ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Stanley Druckenmiller predicts stablecoins will dominate global payments within 10-15 years, citing efficiency and utility.
• Global stablecoin transaction value is projected to reach $56 trillion by 2030, up from $33 trillion in 2025 (a 72% increase).
• Visa and Mastercard are aware of stablecoins and are exploring partnerships and integration into their businesses.
• Mastercard executives downplayed the threat, noting most stablecoin volume is still used for cryptocurrency trading, not traditional payments.
news.Keywords: stablecoins, global payments, disruption, Visa, Mastercard

The vehicle was supposed to be more than 18 inches ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla China denied reports of developing a new, smaller, cheaper SUV model.
• Reuters had reported Tesla was contacting suppliers for a new electric SUV, potentially cheaper than the Model Y ($39,990 MSRP).
• Tesla's stock experienced volatility following the denial, with shares dipping shortly after the opening bell.
• The company's automotive sales, which include leasing and credits, accounted for over 70% of its $69.5 billion revenue in 2025.

news.Title: Why Broadcom Stock Is a Better Long-Term AI Stock to Buy Than Nvidia
news.Content: When investors think about the artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure build-out, Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) is usually the first name that comes to mind. The tech company's graphics processing units (GPUs) have powered the initial wave of the generative AI boom, rewarding shareholders handsomely along the way. But as the market matures, a new dynamic is taking shape. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom (AVGO) is highlighted as a better long-term AI stock pick than Nvidia.
• Nvidia's fiscal Q4 2026 revenue reached $68.1 billion (73% YoY growth), with a 75.2% non-GAAP gross margin.
• Hyperscalers are increasingly developing custom AI chips for cost and energy efficiency, challenging Nvidia's GPU dominance.
• Broadcom's AI semiconductor revenue surged 106% YoY to $8.4 billion in fiscal Q1 2026.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, custom silicon, Nvidia, Broadcom, competitive landscape

news.Title: Amazon Stock Just Saw Its Biggest Surge in Months. Here Are 3 Reasons AMZN Is a Great Buy Right Now
news.Content: Skeptics have grown increasingly concerned about a potential bubble in artificial intelligence (AI) stocks. Those fears are overblown, according to Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) CEO Andy Jassy. In a letter to shareholders, Jassy explained why he's excited about the cloud computing titan's AI-driven future. Investors took notice, driving Amazon's shares up nearly 14% this week. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) CEO Andy Jassy is highly optimistic about AI, comparing its adoption speed to electricity but 'ten times faster'.
• AWS's AI revenue run rate exceeded $15 billion in Q1, with capacity constraints being the primary limitation on growth.
• Amazon plans approximately $200 billion in capital expenditures for 2026, largely dedicated to AI infrastructure.
• These significant investments are backed by customer commitments and are projected to deliver attractive returns within a couple of years.
news.Keywords: Amazon, AI, AWS, capital expenditure, investment strategy

news.Title: Parnassus Value Equity Fund's Strategic Moves: AstraZeneca PLC Takes Center Stage
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Insightful Portfolio Adjustments in the First Quarter of 2026 Parnassus Value Equity Fund ( Trades , Portfolio ) recently submitted its N-PORT filing for the first quarter of 2026, revealing strategic investment decisions made during this period. As part of Jerome Dodson ( Trades , Portfolio )s Parnassus Investments, the fund is known for its fossil-fuel-free and positive workplace ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Parnassus Value Equity Fund added AstraZeneca PLC and Boston Scientific Corp in Q1 2026.
• The fund increased its stake in JPMorgan Chase & Co (14.59% increase) and Waste Management Inc (28.59% increase).
• Parnassus Value Equity Fund exited positions in AstraZeneca PLC and Danaher Corp.
• Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) remains a top holding at 4.23% of the portfolio.
news.Keywords: Parnassus Value Equity Fund, portfolio changes, stock additions, stock reductions, Alphabet

news.Title: Mark Your Calendar: Oklo Could Be a Very Different Stock After July 4
news.Content: In the coming decades, a new $10 trillion opportunity will be available, according to a new report from Bank of America . The bank is deeming this coming opportunity a "nuclear renaissance." The thesis here is simple. The artificial intelligence (AI) industry is expanding rapidly. But to make AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Bank of America identifies a $10 trillion 'nuclear renaissance' opportunity driven by AI's power demands.
• Oklo (OKLO) is developing small modular reactors (SMRs) to address data center power needs.
• Oklo's SMR demonstration reaching criticality by July 4, 2026, is a key proof point for its technology.
• Achieving criticality could accelerate DOE and Nuclear Regulatory Commission approvals, aiding Oklo's goal of having its first project online by the end of 2027.
news.Keywords: nuclear energy, AI, data centers, Oklo, SMRs

news.Title: 5 Genius AI Stock Picks (Hint: Nvidia Is One of Them)
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) stocks aren't nearly as popular with the market as they once were. There may be some investor fatigue setting in because it has been the sector to invest in since 2023. However, I think investors need to get used to the new paradigm, as AI stocks will likely be among the best performers for the next decade. There is still plenty of infrastructure buildout left to go, as well as AI application companies that can automate and take ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is a top AI stock with projected 71% revenue growth, driven by its leadership in AI chips and GPUs.
• Broadcom (AVGO) focuses on custom AI ASICs, aiming for its custom AI chip business to reach $100 billion by 2027.
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) is the primary manufacturer for AI firms, forecasting a 50%+ CAGR for AI chip revenue from 2024-2029.
• Nebius (NBIS) expects its annual run rate to increase to $7-$9 billion this year, up from $1.25 billion in 2025.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, Nvidia, Broadcom, Taiwan Semiconductor, Nebius

news.Title: 99檔威風 連兩季營收創高
news.Content: 上市櫃3月及第一季營收陸續出爐，AI相關產業與電子族群表現強勁，累計有近百家公司第一季營收創歷史單季新高，其中，「護國神山」台積電（2330）當仁不讓，首季合併營收達1.13 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 上市櫃公司3月及第一季營收陸續出爐，AI相關產業與電子族群表現強勁，累計有近百家公司第一季營收創歷史單季新高。
• 台積電首季合併營收達1.13兆元，年增衝高至35.13％領軍，法人指出，AI與半導體產業仍是中長期成長主軸。
• 緯創、廣達第一季營收亦同步創新高，分別達8,463億元、8,092億元，年增各144.25％、66.62％。
• AI ASIC需求預計於下半年擴大，整體而言，從上游晶片製造到下游伺服器等領域，相關產業鏈皆維持強勁成長趨勢。
news.Keywords: 營收創高,AI,半導體,台積電,廣達,緯創

news.Title: 陳奕光專欄－中東戰事暫歇 台股震盪走升
news.Content:
中東戰事停戰兩周，伊朗允諾荷姆茲海峽開放，暫解市場擔憂情緒，短期有利台股盤勢表現。操作上，以分批高出低進為宜。選股方向上，可聚焦CPO、低軌衛星、IC載板等今年產業持續成長的族群。

全球及總經環境解析：

美以伊戰爭已持續超過4 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 中東戰事暫歇，伊朗允諾荷姆茲海峽開放，暫解市場擔憂情緒，短期有利台股盤勢表現。
• 美伊談判主要癥結在於伊朗交出濃縮釉與放棄製造飛彈等條件；以色列與黎巴嫩亦計劃談判，戰事降溫機會增加。
• 預期當前需求對通膨的助長力道將低於2022年，給予聯準會觀望空間，今年的降息機會仍將取決於油價。
• 台積電4月16日法說，預期公布亮眼財報與第二季營運展望；先進封裝產能供給缺口擴大，對設備供應鏈帶來正面利多。
news.Keywords: 中東戰事,台股,油價,通膨,台積電法說,先進封裝

news.Title: 四大利多助陣 台股劍指36K
news.Content: 台股4月上演「神V轉」，權王台積電10日返2,000元整數大關，領加權指數上漲556點收35,417點，改寫史上收盤新高，成交量因周末效應略減至8,718億元，日K棒喜收連四紅 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股4月上演「神V轉」，權王台積電10日返2,000元整數大關，領加權指數上漲556點收35,417點，改寫史上收盤新高。
• 外資在本周連四買共1,884.57億元，創史上單周最大買超，但同步在台指期淨空單日進行避險。
• 受惠美伊戰事利空淡化、上市櫃營收強勁、外資回補買盤及台積法說效應四大正向訊息，看好價值修復行情未完。
• 預料加權指數在下周將挑戰歷史最高35,579點、並往36,000點挑戰。
news.Keywords: 台股,新高,台積電,外資,法說會

news.Title: 操盤心法－費城半導體指數滿血回歸 台股拚創新高
news.Content: 盤勢分析： 4月第一周全球股市震盪激烈，靜心會發現，台股表現強勢的主要力量是台積電股價快速反彈，因為費城半導體指數創新高，台股指數成份以半導體與AI股為主，指數創新高應屬合理，部分個股可能居高思危引發賣壓，但台積電營運 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股表現強勢的主要力量是台積電股價快速反彈，因為費城半導體指數創新高，台股指數成分以半導體與AI股為主。
• 費城半導體近期強勢股有台積電ADR、艾斯摩爾等關鍵廠商，以及英特爾因加入馬斯克的Terafab計畫股價大漲。
• 台積電16日法說公布財報與展望，接下來是美國科技財報周，第一季七巨頭股價大跌但獲利與展望仍樂觀，可望帶動科技股大反攻。
• 美伊戰爭談判不可能會有共識，川普要的是檯面上「勝利的撤兵」，可能以解除對伊朗制裁當籌碼，然後開闢新戰場轉移注意力。
news.Keywords: 台股,台積電,費城半導體指數,AI,美伊戰爭

news.Title: 3月揪團登高 183檔齊爭輝
news.Content: 揮別工作銳減的2月，上市櫃公司3月營收呼朋引伴登高，營收創歷史單月新高股就高掛183檔，包括股王信驊（5274）、股后穎崴（6515）、權王台積電（2330）均赫然 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 上市櫃公司3月營收呼朋引伴登高，營收創歷史單月新高股高掛183檔，包括股王信驊、股后穎崴、權王台積電均赫然在列。
• AI助威，再加上工作天數恢復正常，台股3月營收創新高股相繼冒出頭來，推升3月營收創歷史新高股高掛140檔。
• 記憶體類股成為3月營收創高股中最占篇幅的族群，南亞科、華邦電、群聯、威剛等3月營收也同樣邁大步。
• 散熱類股3月營收寫歷史新高，包括雙鴻、奇鋐、健策等。

news.Title: 台積締最強Q1 營收站穩兆元
news.Content: 晶圓代工龍頭台積電3月合併營收年月雙增，並再度改寫單月歷史新高紀錄；累計首季合併營收持續站穩兆元規模，締造歷年最強第一季，凸顯AI需求全面爆發下，台積 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 晶圓代工龍頭台積電3月合併營收年月雙增，並再度改寫單月歷史新高紀錄；累計首季合併營收持續站穩兆元規模，締造歷年最強第一季。
• 凸顯AI需求全面爆發下，台積電強勢突破長期以來的傳統淡季循環，第二季營運可望延續首季表現。
• 高效能運算（HPC）與AI仍為最大成長引擎，輝達新一代AI晶片GB300放量，加上ASIC客戶需求升溫，帶動先進製程與先進封裝產能維持高稼動率。
• AI需求快速崛起，使輝達躍升為台積電最大客戶，貢獻比重超越蘋果，顯示產業主軸由消費性電子轉向AI與資料中心的結構性趨勢已成形。
news.Keywords: 台積電,營收,AI,HPC,先進製程,先進封裝

news.Title: Seagate and Sandisk Stocks Popped on Ceasefire News. Should You Buy the Memory Stocks Now?
news.Content: Memory and storage stocks surged after a two-week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran was announced this week, easing fears around a potential disruption in the Strait of Hormuz and restoring risk appetite across semiconductor markets. Shares of Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) and Sandisk Corporation (SNDK) rallied sharply alongside peers, reversing recent weakness as investors rotated back into high-beta AI infrastructure plays. Just days earlier, geopolitical tensions had weighed on the sector, triggering a pullback in memory names. The ceasefire announcement, while temporary, has improved near-term supply chain visibility, particularly for critical inputs like energy and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Seagate Technology (STX) and Sandisk Corporation (SNDK) rallied following a U.S.-Iran ceasefire announcement, easing supply chain fears.
• Seagate's stock is up 625.85% over the past year and 83.82% year-to-date, driven by AI-led demand.
• Seagate reported Q2 fiscal 2026 revenue of $2.8 billion (up 22% YoY), with non-GAAP EPS rising to $3.11.
• Sandisk is a NAND flash memory provider benefiting from AI-driven infrastructure spending and strong memory pricing.
news.Keywords: memory stocks, AI demand, Seagate, Sandisk, stock rally

news.Title: Preparing for the Next Market Crash? This Is One Stock You'll Want On Your Watchlist.
news.Content: Market crashes don't happen often. But when they do, they tend to separate strong businesses from the rest of the market. In good times, almost everything can go up. But in downturns, investors quickly shift their focus to companies that can hold up under tough conditions. That's why we must have a watch list stock ready to buy when the market offers that opportunity. And one company ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOG) is considered resilient due to Google Search's 91% global market share and its intent-based advertising model.
• Advertising represented 72% of Alphabet's Q4 2025 revenue, with YouTube and Google Cloud also driving growth.
• Potential risks include AI impacting digital advertising and the core advertising business's sensitivity to economic downturns.
• The company balances stable advertising revenue with growth from AI and other ventures.
news.Keywords: Alphabet, Google Search, AI, business model, advertising

news.Title: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy Just Delivered Bad News for the Artificial Intelligence (AI) Bears
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) stocks have struggled this year, not only because of the Iran War, but also due to waning sentiment toward the sector. news.Content: Investors just got their first taste of the war in Iran's impact on prices, and it wasn't pretty. Inflation soared in March, with the Consumer Price Index (CPI) rising 3.3% year over year and 0.9% month over month.
