news.Title: AI產業下一個瓶頸：為何美國製造的頂級晶片仍必須往返台灣
news.Content:
隨著 AI 產業對運算效能的需求飆升，先進封裝這個長期遭忽視的半導體環節，正迅速成為全球科技供應鏈的下一個致命瓶頸，

《CNBC》報導，儘管當前輿論焦點多集中在晶圓製造，但實際上所有驅動 AI 的晶片，最終都必須透過精密的封裝 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI產業對先進封裝需求飆升，成為全球科技供應鏈的下一個瓶頸。
• 台積電CoWoS先進封裝需求大幅增長，複合年成長率高達80%，輝達已鎖定大部分產能。
• 日月光預估其2026年先進封裝業務銷售額將翻倍，顯示市場熱度高。
• 美國試圖將供應鏈本土化，台積電亞利桑那州封裝廠、英特爾投資成為焦點。
• 台積電雖在亞利桑那州設晶圓廠，但100%晶片仍需運回台灣封裝，增加物流時間與地緣政治風險。
news.Keywords: AI,先進封裝,台積電,CoWoS,日月光,輝達,供應鏈,美國製造,地緣政治風險

news.Title: Forget SpaceX: Is RocketLab Stock the Better Buy?
news.Content: Elon Musk's space exploration brainchild, SpaceX , is set to hit the market through an initial public offering (IPO) expected in June. With Bloomberg reporting a target valuation of over $2 trillion, it would become one of the world's largest public companies. But is it a good investment? Let's compare SpaceX to a smaller alternative, RocketLab (NASDAQ: RKLB) , to see which stock might make the better long-term bet. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is targeting a valuation of over $2 trillion for its IPO, potentially making it one of the world's largest public companies.
• Rocket Lab (RKLB) is presented as a smaller alternative with potentially more room for growth, having a market cap of $37 billion.
• SpaceX's revenue grew 18% in 2025, a deceleration from 64% growth in 2024, while Rocket Lab could boost operations with its new Neutron rocket.
• SpaceX faces political exposure due to Elon Musk's leadership, potentially impacting regulatory permissions and government contracts.
• Rocket Lab's Neutron program has faced delays, posing a risk to its commercial operation timeline and profitability expectations.
news.Keywords: SpaceX, IPO, Rocket Lab, RKLB, valuation, growth, political exposure, Neutron rocket, delays

news.Title: Apple Shares Rise on Wedbush Bullish Call
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Apple ( NASDAQ:AAPL ) climbed about 2% on Wednesday, lifted by a U.S.-Iran ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple (AAPL) shares rose about 2% on Wednesday, boosted by a U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and bullish commentary from Wedbush on Mac demand.
• Wedbush analyst Matt Bryson noted extended lead times for Mac mini (2-3 months) and Mac Studio (2-3 weeks) reflect strong demand.
• This strength is notable given overall PC shipment slumps due to higher memory costs.
• Apple may be gaining share in the handset market as it does not appear to be reducing builds like peers.
• Some analysts attribute Mac mini demand to OpenClaw, an open-source project for running agentic AI tasks locally.
news.Keywords: Apple, AAPL, Mac, demand, lead times, Wedbush, AI, OpenClaw, market share

news.Title: Micron Deepens AI Push With SiMa.ai Deal
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Micron Technology ( NASDAQ:MU ) is leaning further into ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) is deepening its AI push by investing in SiMa.ai to scale physical AI systems.
• The partnership focuses on efficiently combining compute and memory for edge use cases, leveraging Micron's LPDDR5X memory.
• SiMa.ai's platform integrates Micron memory for better bandwidth and lower power consumption in robotics and autonomous systems.
• The broader trend is toward physical AI, embedding intelligence into machines operating in real environments, where performance-per-watt is critical.
• Micron's expanded role in AI infrastructure highlights the importance of memory integration for AI performance.
news.Keywords: Micron, MU, AI, SiMa.ai, physical AI, edge computing, memory integration, performance-per-watt, robotics

news.Title: Veteran Analyst Says Microsoft, Salesforce to Lead Tech Rally After Ceasefire
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . The Magnificent Seven and broader technology sector are likely to benefit from a risk-on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Wedbush believes Microsoft (MSFT), Salesforce, and ServiceNow are well-positioned to benefit from a risk-on environment following the Iran ceasefire.
• The firm sees the sell-off in software stocks as overblown, with companies integrating AI rather than being replaced by it.
• Concerns about AI incumbents shifting to enterprise software infrastructure are considered a stretch.
• Revenue generation will focus on partnering around AI workflows, according to CIOs surveyed by Wedbush.
• Microsoft's Azure AI services and Copilot business are benefiting from AI integration, with a large remaining performance obligation (RPO) of $625 billion.
news.Keywords: Microsoft, MSFT, Salesforce, ServiceNow, AI, software stocks, ceasefire, cloud computing, RPO, workflow

news.Title: Market indexes soared on the Iran truce, but risks remain
news.Content: The top market indexes all rose today, thanks to a two-week truce in the war with Iran. The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) , the Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) , and the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) were up by 2.3%-2.9% as of this writing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Major market indexes rose significantly due to a two-week truce in the Iran war, with the S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite, and Dow Jones Industrial Average all gaining.
• Alphabet (GOOG) and Meta Platforms (META) were key drivers of the tech sector's gains, with META rallying 8% and GOOG up 4%.
• Meta launched its new large language model, Spark, which should help scale its AI tools faster than the previous Llama system.
• Despite the day's gains, Meta is down 6% year-to-date, and Alphabet is up only 2%.
• The ceasefire is viewed positively, but risks remain due to the fragile nature of the truce and ongoing restrictions in the Strait of Hormuz.
news.Keywords: Market indexes, Iran truce, Alphabet, GOOGL, Meta Platforms, META, AI, LLM, Spark, year-to-date performance

news.Title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview Just Sent Shockwaves Through the Cybersecurity Industry. It's Now Joining Forces with Nvidia, Amazon, Apple, Google, and Microsoft
news.Content: Experts have long said that artificial intelligence (AI) would change the face of cybersecurity. While many industry leaders have already deployed AI tools to prevent hacks, data breaches, and cyberattacks, the potential for sophisticated intrusions just took a giant leap forward. AI start-up Anthropic unveiled the Claude Mythos Preview, its latest frontier AI model. This ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI startup Anthropic unveiled Claude Mythos Preview, identifying thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities across critical infrastructure.
• This revelation sparked Project Glasswing, a collaboration including Nvidia (NVDA), Amazon (AMZN), Apple (AAPL), Alphabet (GOOGL), Broadcom (AVGO), Microsoft (MSFT), and Cisco (CSCO) to address these vulnerabilities.
• The initiative aims to secure critical infrastructure against AI-powered attacks by plugging identified gaps.
• Mythos Preview found high-severity vulnerabilities in major operating systems and web browsers.
• This broad coalition highlights the seriousness of AI's impact on cybersecurity and the ongoing age of AI development.
news.Keywords: Anthropic, Claude Mythos, AI, cybersecurity, zero-day vulnerabilities, Project Glasswing, collaboration, Nvidia, Amazon, Apple, Alphabet, Broadcom, Microsoft, Cisco

news.Title: Applied Materials Just Launched a New Chipmaking System. Should You Buy AMAT Stock Here?
news.Content: Applied Materials (AMAT) stock is extending gains on Wednesday morning after the firm announced a breakthrough in transistor manufacturing. On April 8, the semiconductor equipment manufacturer launched two new deposition systems — the Precision Selective Nitride PECVD and Trillium ALD ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Applied Materials (AMAT) launched two new deposition systems, Precision Selective Nitride PECVD and Trillium ALD, for 2nm and 'angstrom-era' logic chips.
• These systems position AMAT as a key enabler for next-generation semiconductors like Gate-All-Around (GAA) transistors.
• AMAT's tools solve critical atomic-scale challenges in depositing metals and dielectrics with angstrom-level precision.
• The company secured a foothold in the 2nm process node, locking in multi-year sales streams from foundries like TSMC and Samsung.
• AMAT's stock is up nearly 45% year-to-date, trades at a forward P/E of 31x, and has a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).
news.Keywords: Applied Materials, AMAT, semiconductors, chipmaking, deposition systems, 2nm process, GAA transistors, AI infrastructure, valuation

news.Title: Analysts See Massive Upside in Microsoft: Time to Buy MSFT Stock?
news.Content: With a loss of over 23% as of April 7 closing prices, Microsoft is the worst-performing Magnificent 7 stock this year. The stock is also underperforming its average S&P 500 Index ($SPX) peer this year, something it also did in the previous two years. Notably, while Microsoft was seen as a defensive play given its relatively stable business compared to other Big Tech companies, it failed to live up to that perception this year and has underperformed ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) is the worst-performing Magnificent 7 stock year-to-date, down over 23%, and underperforming its S&P 500 peers.
• Goldman Sachs reiterated a 'Buy' rating with a $600 target price, implying 61% upside, while Benchmark initiated coverage with a 'Buy' and $450 target.
• Microsoft's stock is down nearly 33% from its 52-week highs, with concerns over ballooning capex for AI infrastructure and Azure's decelerating growth (39% in fiscal Q2 2026).
• Concentration risk exists with OpenAI accounting for 45% of Microsoft's remaining performance obligations (RPOs).

news.Title: ARM Stock Up 32% YTD: Should You Wait for a Better Entry Point?
news.Content: Arm Holdings ARM sits at the center of the global semiconductor ecosystem, with its stock rocketing 32% so far this year. So, let's see if investors should buy ARM stock now or wait for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings (ARM) stock is up 32% year-to-date, driven by its chip architecture powering billions of devices, particularly smartphones.
• ARM's licensing model generates scalable royalty streams without heavy manufacturing costs.
• The company reported adjusted earnings of 43 cents per share in Q4 2025, beating estimates by 4.9%, and quarterly revenues reached $1.24 billion, up 26.4% YoY.
• ARM's ecosystem creates a powerful competitive advantage through a two-sided network effect connecting developers and manufacturers.
• Morgan Stanley downgraded ARM stock due to valuation concerns, cyclical industry dynamics, and the company's shift into developing its own physical silicon for AI.

news.Title: Waymo ride quietly arrives in a new key U.S. city
news.Content: Imagine opening an app, booking a ride, and a vehicle with no driver shows up to take you to a long-awaited errand. That’s no longer a concept. It’s a reality in Nashville. Waymo, a subsidiary of Alphabet Inc., is a U.S.-based autonomous driving technology company headquartered in Mountain View, California. As of March 2026, Waymo operates commercial robotaxi services across 10 major U.S. metropolitan areas, with a fleet of about 3,000 vehicles. Waymo also delivers roughly 500,000 paid rides each week and has surpassed 200 million fully autonomous miles driven, proving its growing scale and leadership in self-driving technology. Waymo ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Waymo, an Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) subsidiary, has launched its fully autonomous ride-hailing service in Nashville, expanding its operations to 11 U.S. cities.
• Waymo operates commercial robotaxi services across 10 major U.S. cities with a fleet of about 3,000 vehicles, delivering roughly 500,000 paid rides weekly.
• The company plans to integrate its service with the Lyft platform later in 2026, with Lyft acting as a fleet management partner.
• Nashville's mix of tourism, nightlife, and growth makes it an ideal environment for autonomous transport.
• Waymo leads the U.S. robotaxi race but faces competition from Tesla, Amazon-owned Zoox, and startups like Waabi and Nuro.
news.Keywords: Waymo, Alphabet, GOOGL, autonomous driving, robotaxi, ride-hailing, Nashville, Lyft, competition

news.Title: Meta launches Muse Spark AI model as part of its AI turnaround
news.Content: Meta ( META ) on Wednesday launched what it said is its most powerful AI model yet, a key piece of its broader AI rebuilding effort. The model, called Muse Spark, is the first from the company’s Meta Superintelligence Lab (MSL), which CEO Mark Zuckerberg unveiled in June. Meta ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) launched Muse Spark, its first AI model from its Superintelligence Lab, designed to catch up with rivals.
• The model is initially available on the Meta AI app and website, and will replace existing Llama models powering Meta's platforms.
• Muse Spark features multimodal reasoning, tool-use support, and multi-agent orchestration, aiming for capabilities competitive with Gemini and GPT Pro.
• Meta is investing heavily in AI, expecting to spend between $115 billion and $135 billion in 2026.
• Meta's stock rose more than 9% intraday on the news of the Muse Spark AI model debut.
news.Keywords: Meta Platforms, META, AI model, Muse Spark, Superintelligence Lab, LLM, investment, stock performance, competition

news.Title: 美伊停火重磅利多！台股創史上第二大漲點　盤中閃現「41千金」
news.Content:
財經中心／林浩博報導

受到美伊停戰的重磅利多激勵，台股今（8）日締造多項壯麗紀錄。加權指數在多頭總司令台積電帶領下，狂飆1531.56點 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停戰重磅利多激勵，台股8日締造多項紀錄，加權指數狂飆1531.56點，創史上第二大收盤漲點。
• 盤中首度出現「40檔千金股」里程碑，PCB大廠金像電一度漲停，終場收998元。
• 股王信驊站穩萬點關卡，強勢衝上12,615元漲停；半導體測試介面廠穎崴亦紅燈鎖死。
• 14檔千元大股同步漲停，包括台光電、奇鋐、嘉澤、旺矽等，寫下史上最剽悍的高價股收盤表現。

news.Title: Why Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3X ETF Jumped 18% Today
news.Content: At noon ET, shares of the Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3X ETF (NYSEMKT: SOXL) were up by 18%. As expected, that's three times the 6% gain seen in the popular iShares Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ: SOXX) , which tracks the returns of the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3X ETF (SOXL) jumped 18% today, driven by gains in semiconductor stocks like Nvidia (NVDA), AMD, Micron (MU), and Broadcom (AVGO).
• Easing geopolitical tensions related to the Iran ceasefire have benefited chip stocks, with Nvidia up 2%, AMD and Broadcom up over 4%, and Micron soaring 7.4%.
• Chipmakers require helium gas, one-third of which comes from Qatar and must ship through the Strait of Hormuz, making the ceasefire beneficial.
• Leveraged ETFs like SOXL offer amplified gains on good days but fall faster in challenging times and are designed for single-day accuracy.
• The article advises caution with leveraged ETFs due to volatility decay, higher fees, and potential underperformance compared to non-leveraged counterparts over the long term.
news.Keywords: Semiconductor ETF, SOXL, Nvidia, NVDA, AMD, Micron, MU, Broadcom, AVGO, Iran ceasefire, helium, leveraged ETF

news.Title: Bridge Data Centres Replaces Tenant As Nvidia Chip Probe Intensifies
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Bain Capital's Bridge Data Centres appears to be recalibrating tenant exposure at its Malaysian computing hub, a move that could reflect rising sensitivity around US ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Bain Capital's Bridge Data Centres reportedly replaced tenant Megaspeed International with Zenlayer at its Malaysian facility.
• This move may reflect increased sensitivity to U.S. export controls on advanced AI chips, following U.S. authorities' concerns about Megaspeed's potential chip smuggling.
• Megaspeed had 68.4 megawatts of capacity allocated at the facility, and Nvidia had previously conducted spot checks in Southeast Asia.
• The tenant shift could be a defensive adjustment amid intensified U.S. oversight of semiconductor flows linked to AI development.
• Bridge Data Centres is continuing expansion efforts, seeking additional capital and potentially moving towards tenants aligned with scalable demand and reduced regulatory risk.

news.Title: Apple unveils shocking Nvidia move
news.Content: Apple ( AAPL ) just made a shocking move. It approved a third-party driver for Apple Silicon Macs , Tom's Hardware reported. Although some may view the change as minor, it could potentially create a significant opportunity for Nvidia ( NVDA ) in the AI space. Apple ’s (AAPL) closed ecosystem is a longstanding part of its appeal. It gives the company control over performance , security and the overall user experience in a way that only a few peers can match. But in fast-moving markets, control can become a handicap. It's especially true in artificial intelligence , where platform ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple (AAPL) approved a third-party driver for Apple Silicon Macs, allowing Nvidia (NVDA) GPUs to work with Macs in external setups.
• This move potentially creates a significant opportunity for Nvidia in the AI space, as Apple's closed ecosystem previously limited external GPU use.
• The driver, developed by AI startup Tiny Corp, is aimed at AI workloads and requires advanced users to compile it.
• Apple's approval signals a willingness to allow more flexibility on its Arm-based Macs, making them more accessible to AI developers.
• Nvidia's AI dominance may be forcing Apple to adapt its platform strategy to accommodate the demand for powerful AI hardware.
news.Keywords: Apple, AAPL, Nvidia, NVDA, AI, Macs, GPUs, third-party driver, ecosystem flexibility, platform strategy

news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Anthropic PBC is letting tech firms access a more powerful, unreleased artificial intelligence model to help prepare for possible cyberattacks that might result from the company making the advanced AI system more widely available. news.AI_Summary:
• Anthropic is letting tech firms access its powerful, unreleased Mythos AI model to prepare for cyberattacks.
• Project Glasswing, formed with Amazon, Apple, Microsoft, and others, will use Mythos to hunt for product flaws.
• Mythos has discovered thousands of security issues, including a 27-year-old bug in critical internet software.
• Anthropic is discussing Mythos's security capabilities with US officials.
• The initiative reflects growing concerns about misuse of sophisticated AI models by criminals and hackers.

news.Title: Anthropic Launches Project Glasswing With Amazon, Apple, Microsoft To Test Mythos AI
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Anthropic is starting to frame the next phase of AI deployment less around speed and more around control, and that shift could matter for how investors think ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Anthropic is launching Project Glasswing with partners including Amazon (AMZN), Apple (AAPL), Microsoft (MSFT), and Cisco Systems (CSCO) to test its unreleased Mythos AI model.
• The project focuses on control and risk management in AI deployment, aiming to surface vulnerabilities early and shape guardrails before broader release.
• Mythos, not specifically built for cybersecurity, has already identified thousands of undetected issues, including a 27-year-old bug in critical internet software.
• The collaboration aims to give defenders a head start by allowing partners to test Mythos, identify flaws, and share findings.
• This approach suggests frontier AI development is increasingly tied to risk management, with early-stage partnerships shaping model releases.
news.Keywords: Anthropic, Project Glasswing, AI, cybersecurity, vulnerabilities, Amazon, AMZN, Apple, AAPL, Microsoft, MSFT, Cisco, CSCO

news.Title: Morgan Stanley Just Downgraded Arm Stock on Chipmaking Pivot. Why, and Should You Sell ARM Now?
news.Content: For decades, Arm Holdings plc (ARM) has been designing chip architectures and licensing them to the world’s biggest players, earning steady royalties without ever making chips itself. But now, the company is shifting gears. It has begun developing its own physical silicon, introducing an AI-focused data center CPU tailored for agentic workloads, where CPUs act as the always-on coordinators alongside GPUs. This move signals a deeper push into vertical integration, aiming to capture more value from the artificial intelligence (AI) boom, even if it means stepping into the arena with its own customers. More News from Barchart Dear Google Stock ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings plc (ARM) is shifting gears by developing its own physical silicon, introducing an AI-focused data center CPU for agentic workloads.
• This move signals a deeper push into vertical integration to capture more value from the AI boom, potentially creating tension with existing customers.
• Morgan Stanley downgraded ARM stock due to valuation concerns, cyclical industry dynamics, rising R&D costs, and potential strain on customer relationships.
• Despite the downgrade, ARM stock has gained 27.38% in the past month and 24.4% over the last three months.
• The stock trades at a premium valuation, and near-term challenges cloud growth visibility and pressure margins.
news.Keywords: Arm Holdings, ARM, AI, CPU, data center, vertical integration, valuation, downgrade, R&D costs, margins

Amid this context, the strategy outperformed the S&P 500 Index, which ...
news.AI_Summary:

• The firm exited Oracle and increased its investment in Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM), viewing TSMC as a more resilient play regardless of the semiconductor race outcome.
• Broadcom remains well-positioned but could become less relevant in the future, unlike TSMC which manufactures for all major semiconductor companies.
• Broadcom is a popular stock among hedge funds, with 202 hedge fund portfolios holding the stock at the end of Q4 2025.
• The firm believes certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and less downside risk than Broadcom.

news.Title: Why FMC Rallied in March, Even As Markets Fell
news.Content: Shares of agricultural chemical producer FMC Corporation (NYSE: FMC) rallied 16.8% in March, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . FMC entered March having lost significant value, with the stock having declined 72% in 2025. Last year, a crop down-cycle combined with a significant number of FMC products coming off-patent, leading to pricing pressure and lower ...
news.AI_Summary:
• FMC Corporation (FMC) shares rallied 16.8% in March, recovering from a significant decline in 2025 due to a crop down-cycle and patent expirations.
• The war in Iran has created a supply crunch for certain agricultural chemical inputs, benefiting FMC.
• FMC's CEO mentioned that several buyers are considering the company as a potential acquisition target, sparking interest from investment banks.
• The war's impact on the Strait of Hormuz may have tightened the market for agricultural chemicals like urea and ammonia.
• FMC faces risks including $4.1 billion in debt and potential disappointment if earnings don't meet Wall Street's minimal benefit expectations from the supply crunch.

news.Title: Global Chaos, AI Fears Help Tech’s Dividend Stocks Beat Market
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- An uncertain economy and dangerous geopolitical backdrop have investors buying into technology’s most popular haven trade: dividend-rich telecommunications stocks. After a dismal 2025, telecom is one of this year’s top performing sectors in the S&P 500 Index, rising more than 7% while the broad benchmark is down about 1%. Shares of Verizon Communication Inc. are up 16% in 2026, and AT&T Inc. has gained 10%. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq 100 Index fell into a correction in March, and a Bloomberg gauge of the Magnificent Seven tech giants is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Dividend-rich telecommunications stocks are outperforming the market in 2026, with Verizon (VZ) up 16% and AT&T (T) up 10%.
• Investors are prioritizing predictable cash flows and dividend income amid economic uncertainty and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.
• Tech stocks, including those in the AI trade, have seen rotation into more defensive sectors.
• Telecom companies offer attractive dividend yields (Verizon 5.6%, Comcast 4.8%) and are considered more insulated from the AI build-out race.
• Their infrastructure (fiber-optic cables, cellular towers, data centers) provides staying power, making them part of the HALO trade (high asset, low obsolescence).
news.Keywords: Telecom stocks, dividends, Verizon, AT&T, Comcast, AI, geopolitical risk, defensive sectors, HALO trade, infrastructure

news.Title: Why Constellation Energy Stock Slumped in March
news.Content: Constellation Energy (NASDAQ: CEG) stock is treading on soft ground. It fell 15.3% in March and is down another 4% this month as of this writing, according to data provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence . Important recent updates, including a potential delay in a major project and conservative guidance, took the wind out ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Constellation Energy (CEG) stock fell 15.3% in March and is down another 4% in April due to a potential project delay and conservative guidance.
• The company, the largest U.S. electricity producer and clean energy producer, is positioned to benefit from AI data center power demands.
• The stock surged 58% in 2025 due to its nuclear energy dominance amid the data center boom.
• Constellation's 2026 operating earnings guidance of $11.50 per share missed consensus estimates of $11.78 per share.
• A potential delay in restarting the Three Mile Island reactor (Crane Clean Energy Center) until 2030 could impact its Microsoft (MSFT) data center deal.
news.Keywords: Constellation Energy, CEG, AI, data centers, electricity, nuclear energy, project delay, guidance, Microsoft, MSFT

news.Title: Wall Street Analysts See Silicon Motion (SIMO) as a Buy: Should You Invest?
news.Content: When deciding whether to buy, sell, or hold a stock, investors often rely on analyst recommendations. Media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm-employed (or sell-side) analysts often influence a stock's price, but are they really important? Let's take a look at what these Wall Street heavyweights have to say about Silicon Motion (SIMO) before we discuss the reliability of brokerage recommendations and how to use them to your advantage. Silicon Motion currently has an average ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Silicon Motion (SIMO) has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.27 (approximating Strong Buy to Buy), with 81.8% of recommendations being Strong Buy.
• However, the article cautions against relying solely on ABR due to potential biases in sell-side analyst ratings.
• The Zacks Rank, based on earnings estimate revisions, is presented as a more reliable quantitative tool.
• Brokerage firms often have vested interests, leading to overly optimistic recommendations.
• The article emphasizes using ABR to validate one's own analysis or a proven predictive tool like the Zacks Rank.
news.Keywords: Silicon Motion, SIMO, analyst recommendations, brokerage firms, ABR, Zacks Rank, earnings estimate revisions, stock bias

news.Title: 2 Stocks With Monster Potential to Hold Through the Next Decade of Chaos
news.Content: The next decade will see seismic shifts across many major industries. In particular, both the energy and transportation sectors will be reimagined thanks to rapid advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) technologies . Here are two monster stocks poised to benefit from the transition. 1. Rivian Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) is my favorite growth stock for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Rivian (RIVN) is highlighted as a favorite growth stock for 2026, trading at 3.2 times sales, significantly cheaper than Tesla (TSLA) at over 13 times sales.
• Both Rivian and Tesla are heavily investing in artificial intelligence (AI) for self-driving capabilities and potential robotaxi markets.
• Rivian's expected ramp toward positive gross margins has been pushed out due to rising R&D costs for self-driving technology.
• The robotaxi market is estimated by some experts to be worth over $5 trillion globally.
• Oklo (OKLO), a mini nuclear power plant company, is also positioned to benefit from AI's energy demands, with potential data center customers but is largely pre-revenue.
news.Keywords: Rivian, RIVN, Tesla, TSLA, AI, growth stock, valuation, robotaxi, Oklo, OKLO, nuclear power, energy demand

news.Title: Should You Add a Defense ETF to Your Portfolio in April?
news.Content: The current war in Iran has disrupted the global geopolitical landscape and the outlook for U.S. stocks. It has also sent defense stocks soaring. Over the past year, these three of the biggest aerospace & defense ETFs have outperformed the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF by more than 2x: Will AI create ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The defense sector is seeing increased investment due to geopolitical tensions (Iran war) and the demand for AI-driven defense and cybersecurity.
• Global defense spending is expected to reach approximately $2.6 trillion in 2026, with the U.S. contributing one-third.
• NATO nations have agreed to invest at least 5% of their GDP in defense by 2035, indicating significant future growth for the sector.
• The three major aerospace & defense ETFs (ITA, PPA, XAR) were down at least 13% from their highs, presenting a potential buy-low opportunity.
• Each ETF offers a distinct risk/reward profile: ITA (leaders, liquidity), PPA (broader exposure), and XAR (all-cap, higher risk/reward).
news.Keywords: Defense stocks, aerospace, ETFs, ITA, PPA, XAR, AI, cybersecurity, defense spending, NATO, geopolitical risk

news.Title: An Opening of the Strait of Hormuz Affects More Than Oil
news.Content: The Strait of Hormuz blockade has caused investors, consumers, and businesses to focus on surging oil prices. Oil affects the cost of every product, since land vehicles, ships, and aircraft need it for fuel. Higher shipping costs result in lower profit margins, and many companies try to pass some of these costs on to consumers. Although oil gets headlines, tech investors have also been paying attention to the helium disruption caused by the war. Qatar produces about one-third of helium and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Strait of Hormuz blockade and the Iran war have impacted oil prices and disrupted the helium supply, essential for semiconductor fabrication.
• A decline in helium supply could lead to fewer AI chips, smartphones, and other devices.
• AI chipmakers like Nvidia (NVDA) and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSM), as well as Micron (MU), could be impacted by reduced chip production.
• Fewer chips could also affect revenue for liquid-cooling solutions provider Vertiv (VRT) and demand for AI data centers and their energy needs.
• While the long-term AI thesis remains intact, short-term hurdles exist due to the Iran war, advising investors to monitor the situation but not panic sell.
news.Keywords: Helium, semiconductors, AI chips, Nvidia, NVDA, Micron, MU, TSM, Vertiv, VRT, Iran war, Strait of Hormuz

news.Title: Should You Bet on ANET Stock Amid an Estimate Revision Uptrend?
news.Content: Earnings estimates for Arista Networks, Inc. ANET for 2026 and 2027 have moved up 7% to $3.53 and 6.6% to $4.19, respectively, over the past 60 days. The positive estimate revision depicts bullish sentiments about the stock’s growth potential. Image Source: Zacks Investment Research What is Fueling ANET’s Growth? ANET is gaining healthy momentum as the Arista 2.0 strategy is resonating well with customers. The company surpassed shipments of 150 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arista Networks (ANET) is experiencing estimate revision uptrends, with 2026 and 2027 earnings estimates moving up.
• The Arista 2.0 strategy focuses on investing in core businesses with new AI offerings, emphasizing software-as-a-service, and entering adjacent markets.
• ANET holds a leadership position in 100-gigabit Ethernet switches for data centers and is gaining traction in 200- and 400-gigabit products.
• The company benefits from strong cloud traction and demand for scalable infrastructure, with its unified software stack differentiating it from competitors.
• However, depleting margins due to R&D costs and product redesigns present a challenge.
news.Keywords: Arista Networks, ANET, estimate revisions, AI, networking, data center, cloud, software-as-a-service, margins, competition

news.Title: CoreWeave and Nebius Have Outperformed Every "Magnificent Seven" Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock This Year. Can It Last?
news.Content: The "Magnificent Seven" cohort of stocks hasn't had the greatest run in 2026. These are the year-to-date stock performances for each company: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) : -5% Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) : -6% Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) : -3% Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) : -23% Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) : -8% Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) : -13% Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) : -23% Not a single one of those stocks is in the black for the year, making ...
news.AI_Summary:
• CoreWeave and Nebius have outperformed the "Magnificent Seven" AI stocks in 2026, with Nebius up over 30% and CoreWeave up over 15%.
• These companies compete directly with Alphabet, Microsoft, and Amazon in the AI cloud computing space, focusing on GPUs.
• Microsoft and Meta Platforms are significant clients, renting AI computing capacity from CoreWeave and Nebius.
• Analysts project substantial revenue growth for Nebius (523% this year, 194% next) and CoreWeave (142% this year, 86% next), though they are prioritizing market share over profits.
news.Keywords: AI cloud computing, GPU, market share, revenue growth, competition

news.Title: Intel Joins Musk's Terafab Targeting 1 Terawatt Annual Compute Capacity
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Intel Corp. ( NASDAQ:INTC ) is stepping into Elon Musk's Terafab initiative, a project that could reshape how advanced chips are developed across Tesla Inc. ( ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel is joining Elon Musk's Terafab initiative to enhance chip factory technology for internal chip development across Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI.
• The Terafab project targets 1 terawatt of annual compute capacity for AI, robotics, and space data infrastructure, potentially involving Tesla in full-stack semiconductor control.
• This move could position Intel as a key partner in scaling chip production, aiming to compete with TSMC.
• Intel's stock saw a 4.2% increase following the announcement, reflecting potential investor optimism about new growth avenues.
news.Keywords: semiconductor manufacturing, AI infrastructure, vertical integration, chip technology, Terafab

news.Content: For Immediate Release Chicago, IL – April 8, 2026 – Today, Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Alphabet GOOGL, SK Telecom SKM, NVIDIA NVDA, Amazon AMZN and Zoom ZM. As Anthropic Revenues Soar, Which Stocks Benefit? What is Anthropic? Founded in 2021 by former OpenAI employees Dario and Daniela Amodei, Anthropic is a leading artificial intelligence (AI) company. Claude, Anthropic's brand name for its AI offering, is "built for problem solvers" and helps its users "tackle complex challenges, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Anthropic's AI business, Claude, has experienced rapid growth, with its annual run-rate revenue exceeding $30 billion, up from $9 billion in late 2025.
• The company focuses on enterprise contracts, serving over 500 clients who spend more than $1 million annually on its AI solutions.
• Key public investors and partners include Alphabet (~14% ownership), NVIDIA ($10 billion investment), Amazon ($8 billion commitment and cloud partner), SK Telecom, and Zoom.
• The article suggests that, similar to the internet boom, the AI race may not favor the initial leaders.
news.Keywords: AI, enterprise solutions, cloud services, strategic investments, revenue surge

news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Apple ( AAPL , Financials ) is seeing continued strength in iPhone sales worldwide , with recent ...

• Apple is experiencing continued global strength in iPhone sales, with February sales up 26% year-over-year.

news.Title: Stock-Split Euphoria Is Back, With 5 Vanguard ETFs -- Totaling $724 Billion in Combined Assets -- Taking the Plunge
news.Content: Although artificial intelligence (AI) has been dominating the headlines on Wall Street for years, it's not the only trend that's powered the Dow Jones Industrial Average , S&P 500 , and Nasdaq Composite to new heights. Investor excitement surrounding stock splits has been an important catalyst for the broader market. Last week, the first true blockbuster ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Vanguard announced that five of its ETFs, with a combined $724 billion in assets, will undergo forward stock splits on April 20, 2026.
• The ETFs undergoing splits are Vanguard Growth ETF (VUG), Vanguard Mega Cap Growth ETF (MGK), Vanguard S&P 500 Growth ETF (VOOG), Vanguard Mid-Cap ETF (VO), and Vanguard Information Technology ETF (VGT).
• These splits aim to reduce share prices below $100, making them more accessible to retail investors and potentially tightening bid-ask spreads.
• The splits are driven by the ETFs' strong historical performance, particularly the Vanguard Information Technology ETF, which has gained approximately 1,360% since inception.
news.Keywords: ETF, stock split, retail investors, diversification, market accessibility

news.Title: Super Micro vs. TSMC: Which Semiconductor Stock Is a Better Buy Now?
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . The semiconductor space has never been short on drama. However, when you have Super Micro Computer ( NASDAQ:SMCI ) and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing ( NYSE:TSM ) on the two very different sides of the scale, it is a very different story. SMCI is an automated intelligence server rocket ship, whose foot has ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Super Micro Computer (SMCI) is facing governance and compliance issues, including an investigation into alleged illegal exports to China, despite strong revenue growth projections.
• TSMC, a trillion-dollar foundry company, is benefiting from AI tailwinds but faces geopolitical risks.
• SMCI's Q3 2026 revenue is expected to be at least $12.3 billion, with full-year guidance raised to $40 billion, yet the stock has tumbled 29% year-to-date.
• TSMC guided Q1 2026 revenue up 38% year-over-year to $35.2 billion with gross margins of 63-65%, but trades at a premium valuation.
news.Keywords: semiconductor, foundry, AI tailwinds, geopolitical risk, governance issues

news.Title: US-Iran ceasefire sends investors back to their most beloved stocks
news.Content: The new US-Iran ceasefire brokered late Tuesday has sent investors rushing back to one of their most beloved sectors: Big Tech. Some of the most visited stock quote pages on Yahoo Finance on Wednesday morning include "Magnificent Seven" members Nvidia ( NVDA ), Google ( GOOG ), Amazon ...
news.AI_Summary:
• A US-Iran ceasefire has led investors to return to Big Tech stocks, including "Magnificent Seven" members like Nvidia, Google, Amazon, and Microsoft.
• Futures on the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose over 1,000 points on the ceasefire news.
• Large-cap tech stocks had previously fallen out of favor due to investor rotation into value plays tied to the war and inflation fears impacting interest rate cut expectations.
• The "Magnificent Seven" collectively shed over $1.1 trillion in market cap since the start of Operation Epic Fury.
news.Keywords: Big Tech, ceasefire, market rotation, interest rates, growth stocks

news.Title: Will Palantir Reach $230 Per Share? This Wall Street Analyst Thinks So.
news.Content: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) is among the most popular investments in artificial intelligence (AI) that anyone can make, thanks to its dominant platform and emerging agentic AI service. It's rapidly growing and has some Wall Street analysts placing lofty price targets on its stock. The most aggressive is Dan Ives from Wedbush, who has a one-year price target of $230 per share. With ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir (PLTR) is experiencing strong growth, with commercial revenue up 82% year-over-year to $677 million in Q4, and U.S. commercial sales up 137%.
• Government revenue rose 60% year-over-year to $730 million in Q4, and is expected to grow rapidly in Q1 due to U.S. military operations.
• Analysts expect Palantir to grow revenue by 74% to $1.54 billion in Q1.
• Despite strong growth, the stock's high valuation (235x trailing P/E, 112x forward P/E) suggests significant future growth is already priced in, making a $230 price target challenging.
news.Keywords: AI, commercial revenue, government contracts, valuation, growth stock

news.Title: The Case for Ethereum as the Most Useful Cryptocurrency in Existence
news.Content: In many ways, referring to Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) as only a "cryptocurrency" does it a major disservice. Ethereum is much more than that -- it is also a blockchain ecosystem and a global, decentralized computing platform used by both individuals and large organizations. In short, a case can be made for Ethereum as the most useful cryptocurrency in existence. If ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Ethereum is described as a decentralized computing platform and a DeFi powerhouse, accounting for 57% of Total Value Locked (TVL).
• It is widely used for decentralized exchanges, tokenized assets, and stablecoin initiatives by financial institutions.
• The article suggests Ethereum's next frontier is artificial intelligence, with potential for autonomous AI agents to transact on its blockchain.
• Despite its utility, Ethereum is down 30% in 2026, potentially due to concerns about software's value in the age of AI.
news.Keywords: Ethereum, blockchain, DeFi, smart contracts, AI integration

news.Title: 3 Industrial Dividend Stocks for Reliable Income in 2026
news.Content: Investors seek dividend stocks as a haven during economic uncertainty, and one sector investors can turn to is industrials. Broadly, the sector is filled with mature companies that offer stability through reliable cash flows, enabling them to continuously pay out dividends. The catch with industrials is that it's often a cyclical sector, which can lead to lofty valuation metrics at ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Eaton, 3M, and Illinois Tool Works are presented as industrial dividend stocks offering reliable income.
• Eaton, a pick-and-shovel play in AI, saw its Electrical Americas data center orders up 200% in Q4 2025, with revenue up 40%.
• 3M reported sales of $24.2 billion in 2025, with operating margins at 23.4%, and expects 3% organic sales growth in 2026.

news.Keywords: dividend stocks, industrial sector, AI infrastructure, revenue growth, capital allocation

news.Title: Why I'm Buying Growth Stocks While Everyone Else Is Panic-Selling Tech
news.Content: The war with Iran brought about a major shift in the stock market. While energy stocks have (not surprisingly) gotten a boost, there has been a general rotation out of technology and large-cap growth stocks and into value and small-cap stocks. Part of this can be because of fears that a prolonged conflict could eventually lead to a global recession. In these periods, value stocks generally tend to outperform. Will AI create the world's first ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The market has seen a rotation from technology and growth stocks to value and small-cap stocks due to geopolitical turmoil and fears of an AI infrastructure boom peaking.
• Hyperscalers are projected to spend $700 billion on AI infrastructure this year, but concerns exist about sustainability and returns on investment.
• Alphabet's older TPUs remain 100% utilized, and CoreWeave's GPUs are fully booked, indicating continued demand despite rental rate decreases.
• The author is buying tech growth stocks like Alphabet, Amazon, Broadcom, and AMD, citing their strong cloud growth, AI chip advantages, and favorable market trends.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, market rotation, growth stocks, cloud computing, semiconductor trends

• 台灣經濟成長動能維持高檔，主計總處上修今年經濟成長率至7.71%，受惠於AI資本支出持續擴大。

news.Title: High Dividends Turn Telecom Stocks Into Market’s New Haven Play
news.Content: (Bloomberg) — An uncertain economy and dangerous geopolitical backdrop have investors buying into technology’s most popular haven trade: dividend-rich telecommunications stocks. After a dismal 2025, telecom is one of this year’s top performing sectors in the S&P 500 Index, rising 9.6% while the broad benchmark is down 3.3%. Shares of Verizon Communication ( VZ ) Inc. are up more than 19% in 2026, and AT&T Inc. ( T ) has gained 13%. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq 100 Index ( ^NDX ) fell into a correction in March, and a Bloomberg gauge of the Magnificent Seven tech giants has tumbled 13% ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Dividend-rich telecommunications stocks are becoming a haven for investors amid economic uncertainty and geopolitical risks.
• The telecom sector is a top performer in the S&P 500 this year (up 9.6%), outperforming the Nasdaq 100 and "Magnificent Seven" tech giants.
• Companies like Verizon (up 19% YTD) and AT&T (up 13% YTD) offer predictable cash flows and above-average dividend yields (Verizon: 5.6%, Comcast: 4.8%).
• This rotation is driven by a preference for defensive sectors and predictable returns over the AI trade, which faces concerns about massive capital expenditures.
news.Keywords: telecom stocks, dividend yield, defensive sector, market rotation, AI investment concerns

news.Title: Is the AI Gold Rush Over? Costco and Walmart Just Delivered a Sobering $163 Billion Warning to Shareholders of Nvidia, Palantir, and Other Red-Hot AI Stocks.
news.Content: Over the past three years, artificial intelligence (AI) stocks have driven overall market gains -- investors, from the smallest retail investor to billionaire hedge fund managers, have piled into these players. And it's very easy to understand why. AI promises to shake up the way many things are done, and in a positive way -- the technology may help companies gain efficiency, develop better products faster, and more. And all of this equals cost savings and revenue growth. So investors rushed to get in on big AI names ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The strong performance of AI stocks like Nvidia and Palantir has been tempered by concerns over high valuations, geopolitical instability, and economic uncertainty.
• Costco and Walmart outperformed Nvidia in the first quarter, indicating a shift towards perceived safer investments, with consumer staples ETFs showing gains.
• Nvidia lost $300 billion in market value in Q1, while Costco and Walmart saw substantial market cap increases.
• Despite the recent market correction, the long-term outlook for the AI market remains robust, with projections of trillions of dollars by 2030.
news.Keywords: AI market, stock performance, valuation, investor sentiment, market correction

news.Title: 中東停火利多! 台股創史上第2大漲點 股王.股后飆漲停
news.Content:
財經中心／唐詩晴、賴文軒 台北報導

受到美伊停火兩週的激勵，市場恐慌情緒瞬間煙消雲散，台北股市終場狂飆1,531點，不僅刷新史上單日第二大漲點，外資更是大手筆回補超過千億元，盤面上41千金並列，股王信驊、股后穎崴帶領12檔千 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 中東停火利多激勵，台股8日狂飆1,531點，創史上單日第二大漲點，外資大手筆回補超過千億元。
• 盤面41千金並列，股王信驊、股后穎崴帶領12檔千金股集體漲停，權王台積電也狂飆90元，收在1,950塊。
• 統一投顧分析師認為，若雙方能正式簽訂退兵協定，台股基本面強勁且AI訂單能見度高，有機會挑戰前波高點。
• 資金集中於市值型ETF及高價股，外資近期開始回流台股，有利高價股及高市值個股獲得買盤。
• 統一投顧總經理提醒，需觀察成交量能是否充足，以及油價與通膨影響，短期慶祝行情後需留意高油價造成的通膨影響。
news.Keywords: 中東停火,台股,漲點,外資,千金股,信驊,穎崴,台積電,AI,資金流向

news.Title: Microsoft Pulled Back. Buying Opportunity or Warning Sign?
news.Content: The knock on Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) stock in 2026 is self-explanatory: Capital expenditures (capex) are ballooning, Azure growth is moving a half-step slower than Wall Street demands, and an uncomfortable portion of the cloud backlog is tied to a single unprofitable partner, OpenAI. The stock has shed roughly a third of its value from all-time highs -- its worst ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft faces concerns regarding ballooning capital expenditures and slower Azure growth.
• A significant portion of the cloud backlog is tied to a single unprofitable partner, OpenAI.
• The stock has shed roughly a third of its value from all-time highs, its worst drawdown since 2008.
• Meta Platforms' AI investments were cheered by Wall Street, unlike Microsoft's infrastructure spending narrative.
• Copilot adoption rates have been slower than initially hyped, but enterprise adoption is growing, with customer seats tripling year-over-year.
news.Keywords: capital expenditures, Azure growth, cloud backlog, AI investment narrative, Copilot adoption

news.Title: 台股還有便宜股票可撿？他曝1投資心法：台灣只會越來越值錢

• 財經網美胡采蘋打破迷思，認為「不會再有便宜的東西了，台灣只會越來越值錢」。

news.Title: Tesla Stock Pulled Back 26.2% After a Monster Run. Is It Time to Buy the Dip?
news.Content: Tesla 's (NASDAQ: TSLA) valuation can seem a little confusing. Even after a sharp decline, shares still trade at nearly 14 times sales. Rivian , another EV stock , trades at just over 3 times sales. To be clear, I'm still a big fan of Rivian stock. I think it's clearly undervalued . But that doesn't mean I think Tesla stock is overvalued. In fact, there's reason to believe Tesla could add another $1 trillion to its market cap over the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's valuation is being examined after a 26.2% pullback.
• Full autonomy and robotaxis are identified as key growth areas for Tesla.
• Experts predict large-scale robo-taxi deployment by 2030, with potential for significant market value.
• Cathie Wood believes robotaxis could account for over 90% of Tesla's enterprise value by the decade's end.
• The robotaxi market is estimated to be worth $5 trillion to $10 trillion long-term.
news.Keywords: Tesla valuation, full autonomy, robotaxis, AI investment, market growth

news.Title: Prediction: The AI Bubble Is Readying to Pop, With These 4 Factors Tipping Off Investors
news.Content: Roughly 30 years ago, the advent and proliferation of the internet changed corporate America forever. It opened new doors for businesses that didn't previously exist, as well as gave rise to the retail investor revolution by tearing down the information barrier that had existed between Wall Street and Main Street for over a century. For decades, investors have waited, often impatiently, for the next technological leap forward to take shape. Artificial intelligence (AI) has answered that call, and foundational AI stocks, such as Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , have ascended to the heavens. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article predicts a potential AI bubble burst due to four factors.
• Historical parallels are drawn to the dot-com bubble, emphasizing the optimization curve for new technologies.
• AI stock valuations and the broader market are considered historically pricey.
• Waning hardware scarcity is identified as a potential drag on AI superstars.
• Palantir Technologies' P/S ratio over 100 is cited as a 'bubble' indicator.
news.Keywords: AI bubble, valuation, optimization curve, hardware scarcity, market correction

news.Content: 光學元件股股王大立光 (3008-TW) 敲定 4 月 16 日與台積電 (2330-TW) 同日召開召開法人說明會，除公布 ...

news.Title: 《台股盤後》飆升1531點、收復34K，創第二大漲點
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-08 15:58:19 新聞中心 發佈

美國與伊朗達成停火兩週協議後、美股盤後電子盤及日韓股均強勢彈升，台股今(8)日亦開高走高，在台 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊達成停火兩週協議後，美股盤後電子盤及日韓股均強勢彈升，台股7日開高走高。
• 台積電續強漲逾4%，台達電/奇鋐漲停，鴻海重返200大關，搭配雙D股、跌深台泥/外資點名的緯創表現亮眼，助攻人氣回籠。
• 加權指數終場收在最高點34761.38點，上漲1531.56點或4.61%，創史上收盤第二大漲點，成交量擴大至8562.6億元。
• 19大類股幾乎全面走揚，以玻璃陶瓷類股領漲9.3%，電子股收漲5.4%，電器電纜收漲4.4%。
• 三大法人今日總計買超1579.25億元，外資買超1177.72億元，自營商買超358.68億元，投信買超42.84億元。
news.Keywords: 台股,美伊停火,美股,日韓股,台積電,台達電,奇鋐,鴻海,玻璃陶瓷,電子股,三大法人

news.Title: 群益投信：Q2台股資金仍在AI子產業輪動，留意先進封裝、測試介面等
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】針對台股第二季投資展望，群益中小型股基金經理人周立民表示，儘管地緣政治衝突導致油價波動與短期震盪，但在AI需求全面爆發下，主計總處大幅上修今年經 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 群益中小型股基金經理人周立民表示，儘管地緣政治衝突導致油價波動與短期震盪，但在AI需求全面爆發下，台股基本面強韌，內外資有望重返台股。
• AI仍是市場主旋律，第二季資金預期將在AI子產業中輪動，特別是先進封裝、載板、光通訊以及測試介面等類股尤值留意。
• 群益美國增長ETF經理人吳承恕指出，在AI強勁需求驅動下，美股預期獲利成長有望再加速，AI族群表現可期。
• 群益東方盛世基金經理人洪玉婷認為，日本企業獲利有望達雙位數成長，資金回補空間大，日股後市可期。
• 建議投資人採取「SAFE」投資策略，聚焦AI趨勢，參與AI長線成長機會。
news.Keywords: 群益投信,台股,第二季展望,AI,先進封裝,載板,光通訊,測試介面,美股,日股

news.Title: 5 New Risks to Ethereum Just Surfaced. Is The Coin Still a Buy?
news.Content: According to a new paper released by Alphabet 's Google Quantum AI group on March 30, there are five distinct ways that a future quantum computer could attack Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) by breaking its encryption. That certainly sounds alarming. If everything the new research says is true, would the coin still be a buy? Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google Quantum AI group published research on five ways quantum computers could attack Ethereum's encryption.
• The research suggests breaking Ethereum's cryptography could require fewer than 500,000 physical qubits.
• Quantum computers could compromise individual wallets, admin keys, and smart contracts.
• Potential existential risks include consensus attacks on the proof-of-stake system and data availability sampling.
• The Ethereum Foundation is working on migrating to quantum-resistant cryptography, targeting upgrades by 2029.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, Ethereum, encryption, cybersecurity, cryptography migration

news.Title: Nvidia Stock Just Got Hit by a Shift Not Seen in 13 years. Here's What Investors Should Do Next
news.Content: This has been a tough year thus far for Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) . Despite delivering record-breaking results and a stunning forecast, the stock continues to languish and has been treading water for more than eight months. There isn't any one thing holding back the artificial intelligence (AI) chipmaker, but a confluence of events that have kept the stock rangebound. The geopolitical backdrop, persistent inflation, and questions about the future adoption of AI have weighed on Nvidia's stock, and even some seasoned investors are beginning ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's stock has been rangebound for over eight months due to geopolitical backdrop, inflation, and AI adoption questions.
• Hedge funds are selling stocks at the fastest rate in 13 years, impacting major tech names like Nvidia.
• Nvidia delivered record revenue of $68 billion in fiscal 2026 Q4, up 73% year-over-year.
• Adjusted EPS surged 82% to $1.62, with an impressive gross margin of 71.1%.
• The company has visibility into a $500 billion backlog for Blackwell and Vera Rubin AI chips through 2026.
news.Keywords: stock performance, hedge fund activity, revenue growth, EPS growth, AI chip backlog

news.Title: 【0050加掛不配息有譜2】台積電條款？ETF加掛有雜音 證交所澄清
news.Content: 針對市場盛傳證交所朝開放ETF加掛不配息，且若有ETF「單一成分股超過30%恐被排除」的傳聞，證交所今（8）日否認，第一，該政策目前業者共識不足，且新募集ETF也 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 針對市場傳聞ETF加掛不配息級別，證交所表示，業者共識不足，且新募集ETF沒有排除條款。
• 權重限制並非死板教條，考量台積電等個股權值擴張，實務上有彈性調整空間，最高可放寬至前五大合計65%。
• 開放ETF加掛不配息級別政策能否上路，仍在觀望、研究中，業者內部存在兩大分歧立場。
• 贊成派認為加掛級別能滿足投資人多元偏好；反對派擔憂「大者恆大」與辨識混淆。
• 證交所表示，需待業者達成共識並提出配套方案後，才會進一步討論推動時程。
news.Keywords: ETF,加掛級別,不配息,台積電,權重,證交所,投信,共識

news.Title: 群聯營收飆新高，潘建成稱記憶體雜音僅限零售市場，看好『龍蝦』商機
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】NAND控制晶片群聯電子(8299)執行長潘健成表示，近期市場雖出現記憶體價格鬆動的雜音，但主要集中於零售（Retail）市場的短期供需波動，合約市場不受影響，並揭 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 群聯電子執行長潘健成表示，近期市場記憶體價格鬆動雜音集中於零售市場，合約市場不受影響。
• 群聯3月與第一季營收創下單月與單季新高，看好養『AI龍蝦(AI代理人)』商機。
• 潘健成指出，AI應用帶動PCIe SSD控制晶片總出貨量年增25%，NAND位元出貨量月增18%。
• 群聯長期深耕CSP、伺服器、AI應用與工控等高階客製化市場，佔營收70%以上，需求強勁且穩定。
• 推出aiDAPTIV混合型SSD方案，主打資料安全、降低AI推論成本，獲客戶追加訂單。
news.Keywords: 群聯,潘健成,記憶體,營收,AI,AI代理人,SSD,NAND,CSP,伺服器

news.Title: 【0050加掛不配息有譜1】 網友一面倒支持！ 恐因台積電難產？
news.Content: 近期凱基投信推出被市場稱為「不配息版 0050」的凱基台灣 TOP 50 ETF（00916），引發投資圈對不配息級別的強烈關注。這股熱潮也讓社群紛紛敲碗，希望國內最具指標性的元大台灣 50（0050）與富邦台 50（006208）能 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 凱基投信推出「不配息版0050」凱基台灣TOP50 ETF（009816），引發市場對不配息級別關注。
• 社群紛紛敲碗元大台灣50（0050）與富邦台50（006208）能推出不配息級別，認為「必買爆」。
• 消息指出，ETF加掛級別可能設「單一成分股權重不得超過30%」門檻，0050、006208因台積電權重過高恐被排除。
• 網友認為減少再投入成本和稅務，是長線投資福音，讓投資人自行決定現金流或資產成長。
• 周冠男指出，配息本質是「左手換右手」，且需課徵所得稅，建議投資不應迷信配息。
news.Keywords: ETF,0050,009816,不配息,台積電,權重,配息,長線投資,複利

news.Content: （中央社記者鍾榮峰台北2026年04月8日電）美國和伊朗同意停火兩週，日韓股市暴漲，台股今天飆漲1531.56點，創歷史第2大收盤漲點，股價超過千元的 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國和伊朗同意停火兩週，日韓股市暴漲，台股今天飆漲1531.56點，創歷史第2大收盤漲點。
• 股價超過千元的高價股強勢表態，盤中台股閃現「41千金」，終場首見「40千金」，共計14檔千金高價股高掛漲停。
• 股王信驊衝上漲停12615元，大漲1145元，超越3月18日高點，再創歷史新天價。
• 重返千金股行列的個股包括宜鼎、AES-KY、雙鴻等，金像電盤中一度站上千元。
• 穎崴、旺矽、台光電、奇鋐、嘉澤、致茂、群聯、台達電等終場均鎖住漲停。

news.Title: Prediction: This AI Stock Will Be Worth More Than Microsoft, Alphabet, and Palantir Combined by 2030
news.Content: Finding a stock that will be worth more than Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , and Palantir (NASDAQ: PLTR) combined seems like a far-fetched notion. Right now, these three stocks are worth $6.65 trillion combined. By 2030, this trio could be ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia is projected to be worth more than Microsoft, Alphabet, and Palantir combined by 2030.
• Nvidia's GPUs are critical for AI workloads, driving significant growth since 2023.
• Analysts project 79% growth in Q1 and 85% in Q2, indicating continued AI demand.
• Nvidia anticipates data center capital expenditures to reach $3 trillion to $4 trillion annually by 2030.
• If Nvidia captures a 36% spending share, its revenue could reach $1.44 trillion, implying a $21.6 trillion valuation.
news.Keywords: AI stock prediction, GPU demand, data center spending, revenue projection, valuation forecast

美國總統川普（Donald Trump）同意暫停對伊朗進行更激進的軍事行動，停戰時間則為期2週，市場立刻出現談判的曙光，投資人信心大增，台股今（9日）收盤以34761點作收，上漲1531點，寫 ...

news.Title: 史上第二大！台股收盤猛漲1531點　台積電漲90元
news.Content:
即時中心／綜合報導

受美國總統川普宣布停火兩星期激勵，台股今（8）日開盤，以33,379.50點、漲149.68點開出，盤中指數一度大 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受美國總統川普宣布停火兩星期激勵，台股今（8）日開盤，指數一度大漲1419.53點，終場收34,761.38點、上漲1531.56點，創歷史第二大漲幅。
• 台積電（2330）終場以1,950元作收、上漲90元。
• 電子權值股方面，鴻海收201.5元，聯發科收1,580元，台達電收1,665元，日月光投控收383元。
• 金融方面，富邦金、國泰金、中信金、兆豐金、華南金、第一金均有漲跌幅表現。
• 台股此次上漲1521點，創歷史第二大漲幅。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,漲幅,台積電,鴻海,聯發科,台達電,日月光,金融股

news.Title: 2 Reasons I Wouldn't Buy the SpaceX IPO With Free Money
news.Content: SpaceX is getting ready to go public, and it could be the biggest IPO in history. After the company filed confidentially to go public last week, Bloomberg reported that it's seeking a valuation of up to $2 trillion, though CEO Elon Musk has pushed back on that report. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » SpaceX was valued at $1.25 trillion, based on estimates from the board of directors and investment bankers, in February ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is seeking a valuation of up to $2 trillion for its IPO.
• The company generated $15 billion-$16 billion in revenue in 2025, with $8 billion in EBITDA.
• Based on a $2 trillion valuation, SpaceX's price-to-sales ratio would be approximately 130.
• This valuation is higher than any S&P 500 stock except Palantir, and more than three times higher than most.
• Elon Musk's leadership carries risk due to overpromising and shifting investor attention.
news.Keywords: SpaceX IPO, valuation risk, price-to-sales, Elon Musk risk, market expectations

news.Title: 【台北股市】大漲1531.56點
news.Content: （中央社台北2026年4月8日電）台北股市今天開高走高，收盤漲1531.56點，為 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台北股市今天開高走高，收盤漲1531.56點，為34761.38點，漲幅4.61%，成交金額新台幣8562.6億元。
• 加權指數開盤為33379.5點，盤中最高34761.38點，最低33379.5點。
• 八大類股漲跌幅：泥窯股漲5.15%、食品股漲0.18%、塑化股漲2.04%、紡織股漲0.89%、機電股漲5.41%、造紙股跌1.3%、營建股漲1.61%、金融股漲1.25%。
• 成交量前5名個股為凱基台灣TOP50、群創、友達、主動統一台股增長、元大台灣50正2。
• 漲幅前5名個股為泰宗、期元大S&P原油反1估、富邦蘋果正二N、元大台灣50正2、富邦臺灣加權正2估。
news.Keywords: 台股,漲點,成交金額,類股表現,成交量,漲幅,凱基台灣TOP50,群創,友達,台積電

news.Title: 史上第二狂！台股收盤大漲1531點 台積電狂飆90元收1950
news.Content: 美伊停戰兩周，台股今（8日）開高走高，終場收在34,761.38點，重返34K大關，大漲1,531.56點改寫台股收盤第二大漲點紀錄。最大權 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停戰兩周，台股8日開高走高，終場收在34,761.38點，重返34K大關，大漲1,531.56點改寫台股收盤第二大漲點紀錄。
• 台積電漲90元，收在1,950元，台達電狂飆漲停，鎖在1,665元，聯發科勁揚7.48%，收在1,580元。
• 鴻海也大復活，漲9.5元4.95%，收在201.5元重返200元關卡。
• 記憶體族群吸金，旺宏與鈺創漲停，群聯漲停收在1,725元，南亞科同步上漲8.25%。
• 資深分析師杜金龍分析，台股主升段漲到35,579點應已暫告一段落，接下來將盤整到9月，由台積電領軍衝高至2027年5月，指數上看43,000點。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,漲點,台積電,台達電,聯發科,鴻海,記憶體,群聯,南亞科,華邦電,杜金龍,蔡明彥

news.Title: 台股沒有便宜的股票了！胡采蘋揭迷思：便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字
news.Content:
記者李鴻典／台北報導

你有投資股票嗎？財經網美胡采蘋今（8）天表示，便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字。2020年台灣戰勝疫情之後，台灣就大步走上了強 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 財經網美胡采蘋表示，便宜或貴從來就不是看帳面數字，台灣只會越來越值錢。
• 台股從2019年後進入大斜率上升軌道，破萬後迅速衝破2萬、3萬，今年挑戰4萬。
• 2019年僅大立光一支千金股，今日首度達成40檔千金股，股王信驊股價已破萬。
• 胡采蘋認為，如果還有便宜的股票，是因為大家都漲了，它為什麼沒漲。
• 股價低的股票買了不漲就是貴，股價高的股票一直漲就是便宜股票。
news.Keywords: 台股,股票,便宜,貴,帳面數字,胡采蘋,AI,千金股,信驊,台灣價值

news.Title: 量產專案減少，智原Q1估為今年營運谷底
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-08 11:56:23 黃立安 發佈

ASIC設計服務廠智原(3035)今年第一季營運表現承 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASIC設計服務廠智原今年第一季營運表現承壓，主因量產專案減少，導致單季營收下滑。
• 公司3月營收10.67億元，月增44.72%、年減69.38%；累計第一季營收25.89億元，季減7.8%、年減65%。
• 總經理王國雍坦言，第一季為全年營運谷底。
• 市場關注智原在先進製程合作中的角色與效益，Intel加入Terafab計畫。
• 法人認為，隨著18A平台成熟與生態系擴張，智原可望受惠於先進製程導入門檻提升，強化ASIC設計服務競爭力。
news.Keywords: 智原,ASIC,營收,獲利,谷底,Terafab,Intel,先進製程,AI

news.Title: 美伊停火激勵！台股首見40檔「千金股」齊舞　12檔剽悍鎖漲停
news.Content:
財經中心／林浩博報導

台股今（8）日迎來重磅利多！隨著美國與伊朗同意停火兩週，荷莫茲海峽（Strait o ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊停火激勵，台股8日迎來重磅利多，盤中首度達成「40檔千金股」的史詩級紀錄。
• 受地緣政治風險降溫刺激，資金湧入高價績優股，盤面驚見12檔千金股聯手攻漲停。
• 股王信驊站穩萬元關卡，強勢衝上12,615元漲停位；半導體測試介面廠穎崴亦紅燈鎖死。
• 包括台光電、奇鋐、旺矽、致茂、台達電、昇達科、波若威、宜鼎、竹陞科技與雙鴻等12檔千元大股同步漲停。
• 寫下史上最剽悍的高價股表現。
news.Keywords: 美伊停火,台股,千金股,信驊,穎崴,台光電,奇鋐,台達電,AI,高價股

news.Title: 台光電飆3170元新天價！市值1.1兆力壓中華電與兩大金釵 晉升台股前八強
news.Content: 銅箔基板（CCL）龍頭廠台光電（2383）今（8）日跳空漲停，股價直飆3170元新天 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 銅箔基板（CCL）龍頭廠台光電8日跳空漲停，股價直飆3170元新天價，市值衝上1.13兆元。
• 市值超車中華電、中信金、國泰金，登上台股市值第八大，直逼廣達。
• 台光電產品為PCB上游核心材料，廣泛應用於AI伺服器、高速交換器、智慧手機及車用電子。
• 受惠AI浪潮之下，台光電股價一路飆漲，成為PCB族群第一檔千金股。
• 法人看好台光電在AI及雲端運算帶動下，將持續擴大營運規模，再創歷史新高。

news.Title: 美伊戰事轉折，台股迎反攻，財報成下一階段焦點
news.Content: 【財訊快報／黃啟乙】美伊局勢出現停戰轉機，全球股 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美伊局勢出現停戰轉機，全球股市隨之展開反攻行情，預期市場可望回歸正常軌道。
• 美伊戰事進入第6週，與美國預期相符，第6週將出現轉折關鍵。
• 荷姆茲海峽通行可望逐步恢復，油價率先回落，布蘭特原油呈現頭部形態，顯示高點已現。
• 一旦油價進入下降軌道，對股市的正面支撐將更明顯。
• 台股進入3月營收公布期，第一季財報將陸續揭露，未來盤勢將更多受到財報表現牽引。

• 李忠興指出，近期群創籌碼面呈現投信偏多、外資短線進出頻繁，外資前一日賣超逾5萬張，今日隨美伊停火消息，不排除外資短線回補。
• 從技術面觀察，群創穩守季線24.4元之上，上方壓力區落在26.5元至26.8元。
• 李忠興建議操作群創以「高出低進」為主要策略，避免追價或恐慌殺出。
news.Keywords: 群創,面板股,股價,成交量,外資,投信,技術面,壓力區,AI

news.Title: 蘋果自研AI晶片Baltra曝光！韓媒：蘋果直接測試玻璃基板 意欲掌控封裝決策權
news.Content: 韓媒《The Elec》周二 (7 日) 報導指出，蘋果正加速自研 AI 硬體，已開始測試先進的玻璃基板，用於 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 韓媒報導，蘋果正加速自研AI硬體，已開始測試先進的玻璃基板，用於代號「Baltra」的AI伺服器晶片。
• Baltra預計採用台積電3奈米N3E製程，並採用chiplet小晶片架構組合。
• 為增強供應鏈掌控，蘋果直接向三星電機評估採購玻璃基板。
• 晶片通信交由博通開發，三星電機負責提供T-glass玻璃基板，最終由台積電生產封裝。
• 蘋果意圖掌控封裝決策權，透過垂直整合策略，逐步內部化關鍵技術。
news.Keywords: 蘋果,AI晶片,Baltra,玻璃基板,台積電,三星電機,博通,封裝,供應鏈,垂直整合

news.Title: 超車0050！「不配息0050」009816爆近30萬張成交巨量奪台股第一
news.Content: 台股今（8）日強勢反彈，ETF同步爆出大量，其中「不配息0050」凱基台灣TOP50（009816）盤中成交量衝上近30萬張 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股今日強勢反彈，ETF同步爆出大量，凱基台灣TOP50（009816）盤中成交量衝上近30萬張，奪台股及ETF成交量冠軍。
• 009816主打「股息自動再投入」機制，將股利直接再投資於成分股，不採配息方式，吸引長期投資資金。
• 009816追蹤「臺灣TOP 50指數」，前十大持股以電子權值股為主，台積電權重高達42.2%。
• 法人表示，AI需求持續熱絡，CSP業者積極導入自研ASIC晶片，預計下半年成為另一波成長動能。
• 儘管短期需留意地緣政治與通膨變數，但中長期基本面依然穩健。

news.Title: 187家賺逾1股本！ 謝金河點名「2產業」：獲利會很嚇人
news.Content: 去年台股展現驚人韌性，全體上市櫃公司淨利衝上4.53兆元。雖然台積電以1.7兆元獲利穩坐護國神山，但數據顯示台灣已非「一個人的武林」，去年高達187家公司賺超過一個股本，從AI供應鏈到觀光旅遊業 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 去年台股展現驚人韌性，全體上市櫃公司淨利衝上4.53兆元再創新高，去年EPS突破10元的企業高達187家。
• EPS逾百元有緯穎、大立光、信驊及川湖等4家，謝金河預言，記憶體與通路商首季將繳出爆發性成績單。

• 謝金河指出，台灣企業獲利能力超強，數字令人驚嘆。
• 預期記憶體及通路商第一季獲利將非常嚇人，全年淨利上看5.99兆元，將是支撐台股的重要底氣。

news.Title: 高盛、大摩喊買！ 台積電目標價衝2750元 專家揭「瘋狂上修關鍵」
news.Content: 當川普釋出與伊朗和平協議接近達成的訊號，原油價格回吐，地緣風險暫歇後，市場目光重新聚焦台積電。儘管消費性電子疲軟，高盛與大摩仍因AI需求爆發調升其長期營運展望，產業專家沈萬鈞表示，台積電成長主軸已由AI接手，毛利率與 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 當川普釋出與伊朗和平協議接近達成的訊號，原油價格回吐，地緣風險暫歇後，市場目光重新聚焦台積電。
• 高盛與摩根士丹利因AI需求爆發調升台積電長期營運展望，認為成長主軸已由AI接手，毛利率與資本支出將迎來結構性上揚。
• 儘管消費性電子疲軟，但AI GPU、AI ASIC及傳統伺服器CPU需求強勁，已迅速填補產能缺口。
• 高盛預期下一代AI加速器將推動製程從N5遷移至N3，並進一步往N2推進，先進製程供給到2027年後仍將維持緊張。
• 高盛將台積電12個月目標價上修至2750元並維持買進評等，摩根士丹利維持「加碼」評等，目標價2288元。
news.Keywords: 台積電,AI,毛利率,資本支出,先進製程,高盛,摩根士丹利,目標價,營收,AI加速器

news.Title: 台積電法說會前美系外資調高目標價至2750元，重申「買進」
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】趕在台積電(2330)下週召開法說會前，美系外資在最新出爐的報告中調高目標價，由原先預估的2600元調 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電下週召開法說會前，美系外資最新報告調高目標價至2750元，重申「買進」評等。
• 另一家美系外資重申「加碼」評等，目標價2288元。
• 美系外資看好台積電受惠於人工智慧將帶動多年成長，以及更高的結構性毛利率。
• 預估台積電2026-2027年獲利預估上調約4-6%，主要受惠於AI需求強勁成長及毛利率結構性提高。
• 儘管智慧型手機和消費性電子產品需求疲軟，但AI加速器和AI驅動的伺服器CPU需求強勁，足以抵銷影響。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,外資,目標價,AI,營收,毛利率,先進製程,資本支出

• 啟發投顧分析師丁彥鈞表示，此波上漲主要來自外資回補與情緒修復，建議「逢高調節、拉回再布局」。
• 外資已開始由賣轉買，帶動大盤走揚，內資則偏向賣方調節，形成籌碼面轉換。
• 電子股表現最為強勢，因本益比普遍較高，先前恐慌情緒升溫時跌幅較深，市場回穩資金優先回流。

news.Title: 大和喊進南亞科「目標價292」 專家直指關鍵：定價模型徹底改變
news.Content: 大和證券近期將南亞科目標價由245元上調至292元，具多年市場經驗的基金經理人沈萬鈞直指核心關鍵，若獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間的高位，南亞科的定價模型將徹底改變，從傳統循環股轉向戰略資源供應 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 大和證券將南亞科目標價由245元上調至292元，認為獲利不再是短線暴漲後隨即反轉，而是能維持長時間高位。
• 南亞科3月合併營收181.70億元，第一季累計營收490.87億元，獲利優於預期。
• 第二季conventional DRAM合約價預估季增58%至63%，主因供應商將產能轉向HBM及伺服器應用。
• AI優化改善單位成本與效率，反而會釋放被壓抑的需求，導致總量擴張。
• 北美CSP正與供應商洽談長約，記憶體已成為AI基礎設施中「不能斷料的戰略資源」。
news.Keywords: 南亞科,大和證券,目標價,DRAM,報價,AI,伺服器,長約,獲利,記憶體

news.Title: The Crowd Is Dumping Iren. Here's Why I'd Be Buying It Down 54%.
news.Content: Not that long ago, Iren (NASDAQ: IREN) enjoyed a monumental bull run, soaring from $5 to $76 in less than a year. That euphoric momentum has been depleted. The stock has crashed by 54% from its all-time high, but the long-term picture is stronger than ever. Here's why Iren looks like a buy ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Iren's stock has crashed 54% from its all-time high, with an at-the-market equity program causing skepticism.
• The company has a $11 billion market cap, and the equity program could dilute shares by half.
• Iren signed a landmark five-year $9.7 billion deal with Microsoft for AI data center capacity.
• The company secured a 1.6 gigawatt site in Oklahoma, boosting its total pipeline to over 4.5 gigawatts.
• Iren entered a purchase agreement for more than 50,000 Nvidia chips, indicating strategic moves.
news.Keywords: stock dilution, AI data center, gigawatt pipeline, Nvidia chip purchase, capital intensive

news.Content: （中央社記者江明晏台北2026年04月8日電）對伊朗通牒截止前，美國總統川普表示開放荷莫茲海峽換暫停攻擊2週，美股翻紅多收高，國際油價收盤互有漲跌；台指期夜盤震 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 對伊朗通牒截止前，美國總統川普表示開放荷姆茲海峽換暫停攻擊2週，美股翻紅多收高。
• 國際油價收盤互有漲跌，台指期夜盤震盪，終場漲318點，台積電期貨盤後也收紅。
• 投顧認為有助台股表現，市場預期美伊協商仍有空間，不至於有供給中斷的極端風險。
• 然而，最終協議達成前，不確定性仍將使油市維持高波動，持續牽動通膨與利率。
• 市場解讀外交有降溫空間，資金向具備AI催化劑的科技龍頭集中，有助台股表現。

news.Title: 1分鐘讀財經》台積電法說倒數 外資曝6大必考題！這次「回檔」成致富跳板
news.Content: 小編今天（8）日精選5件國內外重要財經大事。全球晶圓代工龍頭台積電16日召開法說會，外資大型研究機構在槍林彈雨中提問上膛，聚焦台積電2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，同 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電16日召開法說會，外資聚焦2奈米、長線擴產計畫等六大核心議題，並把握回檔機會調升目標價。
• 摩根士丹利、花旗環球、摩根大通證券分別將台積電股價預期升至2,288元、2,800元與2,400元。
• 市場最關注AI需求是否持續升溫，以及對台積電營收貢獻是否擴大；先進製程與封裝需求強勁，關注資本支出展望。
• 預期台積電基調將延續正向，對AI加速器需求將展現更樂觀態度，2027～2028年產能擴增將更積極。
• 台積電2奈米製程推進進度、客戶導入情況及其對獲利與接單動能的挹注，亦是法說會重要觀察指標。
news.Keywords: 台積電,法說會,外資,目標價,AI,2奈米,先進製程,封裝,資本支出,營收

news.Title: 創意3月營收月增15%；Q1寫次高/年增達63%
news.AI_Summary:
• 創意3月合併營收38.60億元，月增15%、年增33%，創同期新高。
• 第一季合併營收114.48億元，季減7.68%、年增63%，創單季歷史次高。
• 公司拿下Google CPU大單，下一代CPU訂單也順利到手，今年CPU產能比去年更多。
• AI晶片進入量產階段帶動出貨快速攀升，量產業務今年有望延續去年強勁成長力道。
• ADAS業務中國、歐洲客戶已開始量產，北美客戶專案也在進行中，對今明兩年展望樂觀。
news.Keywords: 創意,營收,Google,CPU,AI晶片,量產,ADAS,台積電,NRE

news.Title: The AI Supercycle Isn't Over -- It Just Moved. 5 Growth Stocks Riding the Next Wave.
news.Content: Despite the stock market's rotation out of tech stocks this year, the artificial intelligence (AI) supercycle is far from over. However, it has shifted, which is going to benefit a new basket of AI stocks . The AI infrastructure boom started with the need for raw computing power to train large language models (LLMs). This was a race that helped line the pockets of Nvidia with massive ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI supercycle is shifting towards networking, inference, and agentic AI.
• Broadcom is a leader in Ethernet switches and data center networking components.
• Broadcom is also a leader in ASIC technology for the inference market.
• Alphabet is partnering with Broadcom on advanced AI ASICs (TPUs), offering a 44% lower total cost of ownership than Nvidia servers.
• Arista Networks provides networking platforms and benefits from growing AI chip clusters.
news.Keywords: AI supercycle, networking, inference, ASIC technology, data center infrastructure

news.Title: Why Arista Networks Stock Crushed it on Tuesday
news.Content: An analyst move was the main catalyst behind Arista Networks ' (NYSE: ANET) substantial stock price jump on Tuesday. The tech networking equipment specialist's equity, which has done ...

news.Title: 上週外資在集中市場賣超1601.27億元，賣超台積電最多
news.Content:

根據臺灣證券交易所統計，上週(1 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 上週外資在集中市場賣超1,601.27億元，創2022年以來單月與同期第1大賣超。

MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-08 07:13:03 郭妍希 發佈

news.Title: Apple encounters serious problems with foldable iPhone
news.Content: Apple's long-anticipated entry into the foldable smartphone market has run into trouble before the product ever reached a store shelf. The company has experienced setbacks in the engineering test phase of its first foldable iPhone that could delay mass production and its planned shipment schedule, Nikkei Asia reported on April 6, citing multiple sources briefed on the matter. Reuters, which also carried the story, said it could not independently verify the report. Apple did not respond to TheStreet's request for comment. Apple shares ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's foldable iPhone entry faces engineering test phase setbacks, potentially delaying mass production and shipment.
• Nikkei Asia reported that April is a critical stage for engineering verification, with potential delays extending by months.
• Apple planned to launch 7 to 8 million foldable units, less than 10% of total 2026 iPhone production.
• Engineering challenges include hinge reliability, display durability, and component integration into a thin form factor.
• A delay could impact Apple's marketing strategy and give rivals like Samsung more time to capture market share.
news.Keywords: foldable iPhone, engineering challenges, production delay, supply chain, market competition

news.Title: Why Better Home & Finance Holding Stock Trounced the Market on Tuesday

news.AI_Summary:

news.Keywords: credit facility expansion, mortgage capacity, AI adoption, lender confidence, financial services

news.Title: Why ASML Stock Is Down Today
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . ASML ( NASDAQ:ASML ) declined about 4% on Tuesday following the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASML shares declined about 4% following the introduction of the MATCH Act in the U.S. House.
• The bill aims to align export controls on semiconductor manufacturing equipment among U.S. allies.
• Citi Research analysts suggest the move could hurt ASML by restricting sales of immersion lithography tools to China.
• China's ability to expand chip production lines could be limited without these tools.
• ASML derived about 29% of its revenue from China in 2025, and Beijing might retaliate using rare earth minerals.
news.Keywords: export controls, semiconductor equipment, China sales, lithography tools, trade policy

news.Content: Key Points Alliance has secured major studio outsourcing deals — including distributing Disney and Paramount home-entertainment catalogs and the newly announced Amazon MGM relationship — which management says bring higher gross margins and expand retailer access (e.g., Amazon, Walmart). The company reported meaningful margin and earnings improvement (EPS rose from $0.09 in FY2024 to $0.43 TTM, with adjusted EBITDA margin expanding to about 5.01% in the latest quarter) driven in part by warehouse automation that cut vinyl picking headcount and saved roughly $3–$3.5 million annually. Growth initiatives include owned-brand and authentication plays — Handmade by Robots (targeting a potential ~$100M ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alliance Entertainment secured major studio outsourcing deals, including Amazon MGM, leading to higher gross margins.
• The company reported meaningful margin and earnings improvement, with EPS rising from $0.09 to $0.43 TTM.
• Warehouse automation saved approximately $3-$3.5 million annually by reducing vinyl picking headcount.
• Growth initiatives include 'Handmade by Robots' (targeting ~$100M business) and 'Alliance Authentic' (NFC-based collectibles).
• Management expects more meaningful profitability contributions from growth initiatives in fiscal 2028–2029.

news.Title: Phoenix Education Partners Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points Phoenix reported Q2 net revenue of $222.5 million (down 0.4%) with average degreed enrollment up 1.8% to ~82,600; adjusted EBITDA rose 7.8% to $34.8 million and margin expanded to 15.7%, while net income fell to $10.8 million primarily from higher share‑based compensation after the IPO. Management pointed to retention as a key driver — the most recent annual cohort retention reached 76.6% (up ~500 bps year‑over‑year) aided by a digital‑first platform and AI tools — and employer‑affiliated enrollment grew to 35% of total, with over 1 million digital skill badges issued. Executives said Google’s AI -driven search changes ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Phoenix Education Partners reported Q2 net revenue of $222.5 million (down 0.4%) with average degreed enrollment up 1.8%.
• Adjusted EBITDA rose 7.8% to $34.8 million, and margin expanded to 15.7%.
• Net income fell to $10.8 million primarily due to higher share-based compensation post-IPO.
• Annual cohort retention reached 76.6% (up ~500 bps YoY), aided by a digital-first platform and AI tools.
• Google's AI-driven search changes disrupted the marketing funnel, but trends normalized in early March.
news.Keywords: revenue decline, enrollment growth, EBITDA margin, student retention, AI marketing impact

news.Title: 川普最後通牒到期…市場情緒緊繃 台股決戰兵推三劇本
news.Content:
全球股市都在看今天。美國總統川普放話今（8）日上午8時是對伊朗行動的最後期限，市場情緒隨之緊繃，法人圈緊急兵推情勢變化三劇本，作為台股開盤投資依據。

川普 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國總統川普對伊朗的最後期限即將到來，市場情緒緊繃，法人圈兵推三劇本。
• 劇本一：衝突升級，油價急升至130美元以上，股市重挫，台股恐回測前低。
• 劇本二：伊朗讓步開放荷姆茲海峽，戰事和平解決，台股將啟動2000～3000點多頭攻勢。
• 劇本三：第三國斡旋，延長最後通牒或有限度開放，局勢未實質改變，指數延續劇烈震盪。
• 三大法人昨日同步買超，外資轉賣為買超100.7億元，顯示資金回流。
news.Keywords: 台股,美伊衝突,川普,伊朗,最後通牒,油價,股市,停火協議,外資,籌碼

news.AI_Summary:
• Intel is joining Elon Musk's Terafab chip-manufacturing project, a significant win for Intel's foundry business.
• The Terafab project aims to produce chips for SpaceX, Tesla, and xAI, with Intel leading key aspects of fabrication.
• The project is expected to cost roughly $25 billion and aims to produce 1 terawatt of compute per year.

news.Keywords: Terafab project, chip manufacturing, Intel foundry, AI hardware, semiconductor supply chain

news.Title: Nvidia's Artificial Intelligence (AI) Chips Still Need Memory. Here's Why the Micron Sell-Off Has Gone Too Far.
news.Content: In late March, Alphabet unveiled a new software product called TurboQuant. At a high level, TurboQuant dramatically compresses memory footprints in large language models during inference . It didn't take long for headlines to circulate and cause shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) to plunge. In large part, the sell-off was tied to Micron's relationship with Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) since its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) solutions help power Nvidia's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet's TurboQuant software compresses memory footprints in large language models, causing a sell-off in memory stocks like Micron.
• Nvidia's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) solutions power its GPUs, making Micron a key supplier.
• The article argues that TurboQuant does not eliminate the need for Micron's memory solutions.
• Nvidia's latest chip architectures (Blackwell, Vera Rubin) are designed with larger HBM stacks.
• Nvidia cannot easily switch suppliers due to extensive testing and integration requirements.
news.Keywords: TurboQuant, memory demand, HBM, GPU integration, supply chain risk

news.Title: Is Microsoft Stock Going to $587? Wall Street Weighs In.
news.Content: The share price of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) is down 23% year to date. The sell-off appears to stem from concerns about growing artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure spending and broader uncertainty across the software industry around the rise of AI agents and their impact on Microsoft's business. However, most Wall ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft's stock is down 23% year-to-date due to concerns about AI infrastructure spending and AI agents.
• Most Wall Street analysts maintain a buy rating with an average price target of $587, implying over 50% upside.
• Analysts are bullish on Microsoft Azure, with revenue up 39% year-over-year last quarter.
• Microsoft 365 adoption is strong, with Copilot usage doubling year-over-year and customer seats tripling.
• CEO Satya Nadella believes future Office versions could expand the addressable market for Microsoft 365.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure spending, Azure growth, Copilot adoption, enterprise software, stock valuation

news.Title: JPMorgan has a stark warning on Tesla stock
news.Content: Tesla just missed on deliveries, missed on energy storage, and now has one of Wall Street 's most prominent bears renewing his case for significant further declines. JPMorgan analyst Ryan Brinkman reiterated an Underweight rating on Tesla on April 6 and maintained his $145 price target, which implies roughly 60% downside from where the stock currently trades. The note came after Tesla reported first-quarter deliveries of 358,023 vehicles, 4% below the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• JPMorgan reiterated an Underweight rating on Tesla with a $145 price target, implying 60% downside.
• Tesla missed Q1 delivery expectations (358,023 vehicles) and energy storage installations (8.8 GWh, down 15% YoY).
• JPMorgan lowered Q1 EPS estimates to $0.30 and full-year 2026 EPS to $1.80.
• Concerns include execution risk, rising competition, brand controversy, and valuation.
• Expansion into lower-priced vehicles is seen as fraught with greater risk.
news.Keywords: Tesla delivery miss, energy storage decline, EPS estimate cut, execution risk, valuation concerns

news.Title: Tesla South Korea Sales Surge in Q1
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( TSLA , Financials ) said that deliveries to South Korea rose sharply ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's deliveries to South Korea rose 335% year-over-year in Q1, making it the number one imported car brand.
• Factors contributing to the surge include government incentives and rising gasoline prices.
• Tesla's pricing cuts on China-made Model Y and Model 3 also boosted demand.
• Globally, Tesla shipped 358,023 units in Q1, up 6.3% YoY but down 14% QoQ.
• Analysts are divided, with some lowering price estimates while others focus on long-term AI and self-driving growth.
news.Keywords: South Korea sales, EV demand, pricing cuts, global shipments, AI growth drivers

news.Title: How Instacart Stock Could Be an Unlikely Winner From the Latest LLM Updates
news.Content: Internet stocks have gotten crushed this year, and many are still trading down as investors trim their software holdings. Maplebear (CART), which operates as Instacart, has been part of this trimming process, too — but it may rebound faster as the fears surrounding CART stock start to become disproven. The prevailing fear is that ChatGPT and Alphabet's (GOOGL) AI products will become the new "front door" to commerce and cut out companies like Instacart entirely. TD ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Instacart (CART) may rebound as fears surrounding AI platforms cutting out e-commerce companies diminish.
• OpenAI halted its Instant Checkout feature within ChatGPT, indicating a shift in its commerce strategy.
• Google's AI Overviews drive billions of clicks to websites, maintaining Instacart's visibility in its ecosystem.
• Jefferies upgraded Instacart to 'Buy' with a $45 price target, citing OpenAI's pivot and Google's neutrality.
• Instacart is positioned as a preferred infrastructure layer for AI platforms routing grocery transactions.
news.Keywords: AI commerce, e-commerce disruption, AI platforms, stock upgrade, infrastructure layer
